hand-welding-machine-2063-complete-set.seo_p1: Our Hand Welding Machine 20–63 (Complete Set) is a comprehensive, professional-grade fusion kit. It is the workhorse of our tool range, covering the vast majority of standard installation sizes.
hand-welding-machine-2063-complete-set.seo_p2: Built around a high-capacity, electronically regulated heating plate, this machine delivers unyielding thermal stability even in adverse ambient conditions. It comes fully equipped with high-quality, non-stick heating tools from 20 mm up to 63 mm.
hand-welding-machine-2063-complete-set.seo_p3: This set is universally utilised across commercial building sites and complex domestic installations. Whether welding a small basin supply or a substantial riser main, it provides the exact thermal energy required for a flawless molecular bond.

faq.q: Can I mount two different heating mandrels on the device at the same time?
faq.a: Yes, the heating plate offers enough space to mount two or even three common dimensions (e.g., 20mm and 25mm) simultaneously, which speeds up the work.

faq.q: Is a table stand included in the set?
faq.a: Yes, the complete set contains both a table stand and a holding fork, allowing the device to be set down safely during breaks.

faq.q: How heavy is the device with the case?
faq.a: The complete set in the robust metal case weighs approx. 5-6 kg, making it easy to transport on the construction site.

hand-welding-machine-mirror-50125.seo_p1: The Hand Welding Machine Mirror 50–125 is a powerful, large-format heating element designed for manual socket fusion of substantial pipe diameters.
hand-welding-machine-mirror-50125.seo_p2: This heavy-duty 'mirror' boasts a massive thermal mass and an exceptionally precise electronic thermostat. It provides the vast energy reserves necessary to thoroughly melt thick-walled PP-R pipes and fittings up to 125 mm, preventing cold joints.
hand-welding-machine-mirror-50125.seo_p3: It is an indispensable tool for industrial contractors and those constructing large-scale heating manifolds. Despite its power, it remains manageable for manual operation, offering a flexible, highly reliable alternative to fully automated bench welding machines.

faq.q: Does this machine require a heavy current connection?
faq.a: No, despite its high heating power, the machine usually runs on standard 230V mains voltage. However, the circuit should be adequately fused.

faq.q: Can I also weld small dimensions like 20mm with it?
faq.a: Theoretically yes, but the device is very heavy and unwieldy for small dimensions. We recommend the smaller manual welding machines for dimensions below 50mm.

faq.q: How do I control the exact welding temperature?
faq.a: The machine has a digital temperature display that allows exact monitoring and adjustment of the temperature.

welding-tool.seo_p1: The standard Welding Tool comprises the essential heating mandrel and socket pairs required for the thermal fusion process. It is a core consumable item within our professional tooling catalogue.
welding-tool.seo_p2: Precision-machined from high-grade aluminium, these inserts are coated with a premium, heavy-duty Teflon (PTFE) layer. This advanced coating prevents molten PP-R from adhering to the tool, ensuring an incredibly smooth, perfectly dimensioned fusion face.
welding-tool.seo_p3: Available in all standard pipe dimensions, these tools are continually swapped into our hand welding machines on busy construction sites. Their exceptional durability guarantees thousands of pristine welds, drastically reducing downtime and ensuring consistent, flawless pipeline joints.

faq.q: How often does the Teflon coating need to be replaced?
faq.a: With proper care (cleaning only with a dry cloth or wooden spatula), the coating lasts for many hundreds of welds. If scratches appear, the attachment must be replaced.

faq.q: Can I also use these attachments on third-party welding machines?
faq.a: Yes, our welding attachments have standard threads and usually fit all commercially available manual welding machines for plastic pipes.

faq.q: What happens if plastic residue sticks to the attachment?
faq.a: This is usually a sign of a damaged Teflon coating or incorrect welding temperature. The residue must be carefully removed while hot without scratching the coating.

welding-machine-50125-complete-set.seo_p1: The Welding Machine 50–125 (Complete Set) is our flagship bench-mounted fusion station, engineered specifically for the precision socket welding of large-diameter PP-R pipes.
welding-machine-50125-complete-set.seo_p2: This professional-grade machine features a highly stable clamping framework, a digitally controlled heating mirror, and a heavy-duty alignment track. It provides the immense mechanical force and thermal consistency required to fuse pipes and fittings up to 125 mm flawlessly.
welding-machine-50125-complete-set.seo_p3: It is the mandated equipment for fabricating large distribution headers, risers, and industrial pipe spools off-site. The bench-mounted design drastically reduces operator fatigue and completely eliminates the alignment errors common in manual large-scale welding.

faq.q: Is special training required to operate this machine?
faq.a: Yes, handling the table welding machine requires instruction, as joining large dimensions requires precise compliance with welding times and pressing pressures.

faq.q: Can the machine be used outdoors?
faq.a: Yes, but the welding area must be protected from wind, rain and extreme cold to not influence the welding temperature.

faq.q: How is the exact insertion depth ensured?
faq.a: The machine has adjustable stops and scales that guarantee exactly the right insertion depth for every pipe dimension.

butt-welding-machine-90250.seo_p1: Our Butt Welding Machine 90–250 is the ultimate heavy-duty joining solution in our catalogue, designed for the direct end-to-end fusion of massive PP-R and PP-RCT pipelines.
butt-welding-machine-90250.seo_p2: This sophisticated hydraulic machine incorporates a precision facing tool, a high-capacity PTFE-coated heating plate, and an automated pressure regulation system. It effortlessly manages the immense clamping forces necessary to butt-weld pipes up to 250 mm.
butt-welding-machine-90250.seo_p3: Exclusively utilised for district heating networks, municipal water mains, and large-scale industrial fluid transport. Butt fusion eliminates the need for socket fittings on long straight runs, significantly reducing material costs and ensuring a completely smooth internal bore.

faq.q: Are fittings still needed for butt welding?
faq.a: Only for branches or directional changes (T-pieces, elbows). Straight connections are welded pipe-to-pipe without a sleeve.

faq.q: How is the welding pressure built up?
faq.a: The machine has a hydraulic unit with which the exact joining pressure can be precisely built up and held according to the table.

faq.q: Can PP-R and PE be butt-welded together?
faq.a: No, only pipes of the same material (e.g., PP-R with PP-R) can be homogeneously welded together.

electrofusion-machine.seo_p1: The Electrofusion Machine is a state-of-the-art, computerised control unit designed to power our advanced electrofusion fittings. It is a highly intelligent addition to our tooling catalogue.
electrofusion-machine.seo_p2: Encased in a rugged, site-ready housing, this device features an integrated barcode scanner that automatically reads the specific fusion parameters of each fitting. It continuously monitors the ambient temperature and adjusts the energy output to guarantee a perfect weld.
electrofusion-machine.seo_p3: This machine is essential when executing complex repairs, working in highly confined trenches, or joining large-dimension pipes where manual manipulation is impossible. It provides a fully documented, completely reliable fusion process with minimal operator intervention.

faq.q: Does the machine recognize the required welding time automatically?
faq.a: Yes, by reading the barcode on the electrofusion socket, the machine automatically takes over all parameters (time, voltage) for the perfect weld.

faq.q: Can the machine also log the welds?
faq.a: Yes, modern electrofusion machines save all welding protocols, which can later be exported via USB for documentation.

faq.q: Does the pipe have to be peeled before welding?
faq.a: Absolutely. The oxide layer on the pipe must be carefully removed with a pipe peeler before every electrofusion welding.

welding-tool-for-weld-in-saddles.seo_p1: The Welding Tool for Weld-in Saddles is a highly specialised heating element, exclusively designed for our saddle branching system. It is a crucial component in our professional tool range.
welding-tool-for-weld-in-saddles.seo_p2: Coated with premium Teflon, this uniquely shaped tool features a concave heating face to melt the exterior wall of the main pipe, and a convex mandrel to heat the saddle fitting simultaneously. It ensures a perfectly contoured, even melt on both surfaces.
welding-tool-for-weld-in-saddles.seo_p3: It is absolutely vital for installers looking to tap into existing distribution mains rapidly and securely. By providing the exact geometry required for saddle fusion, it guarantees a joint that is as strong and leak-proof as a standard tee.

faq.q: Is a separate welding attachment required for every saddle dimension?
faq.a: Yes, the attachment must exactly match the radius of the main pipe and the diameter of the branch to ensure a dense fusion zone.

faq.q: Can this attachment also be used with the standard hand welding machine?
faq.a: Yes, the saddle welding attachments fit our standard manual welding machines and are simply screwed on.

faq.q: How do I know when the pipe is heated enough?
faq.a: The heating time depends on the pipe dimension and the wall thickness and is stated in our technical guidelines.

drilling-tool-for-weld-in-saddle.seo_p1: Our Drilling Tool for Weld-in Saddle is a precision cutting instrument designed to work in tandem with our saddle welding process. It is a fundamental accessory for pipeline modifications.
drilling-tool-for-weld-in-saddle.seo_p2: Manufactured from high-speed steel, this custom-designed core drill neatly penetrates the wall of the main pipe only after the saddle has been successfully welded. It produces a clean, perfectly circular hole without generating excessive swarf.
drilling-tool-for-weld-in-saddle.seo_p3: This tool is essential for commissioning new branch lines off a live, albeit depressurised, primary main. The clean cut it produces ensures unrestricted fluid flow into the new branch, preventing turbulence and maintaining overall system efficiency.

faq.q: Do I have to drill first and then weld?
faq.a: No, the process is exactly the other way around: First the weld-in saddle is welded onto the main pipe. Only when the weld has cooled down is the pipe drilled through the saddle.

faq.q: Does the drill core fall into the pipe?
faq.a: No, our drill bits are designed in such a way that the plastic core usually gets stuck in the drill bit and can be safely pulled out.

faq.q: Can I also drill with a standard hole saw?
faq.a: We strongly advise against this. Standard hole saws often tear out the hole and produce chips that can clog the pipe system.

welding-tool-for-repairing-plug.seo_p1: The Welding Tool for Repairing Plug is an emergency maintenance instrument, specifically designed to seal accidental punctures in PP-R pipework quickly and effectively.
welding-tool-for-repairing-plug.seo_p2: This compact, Teflon-coated heating element features a precisely tapered profile. It is engineered to simultaneously melt the inner wall of the puncture hole and the outer surface of the corresponding repair plug, ensuring a perfectly matched fusion zone.
welding-tool-for-repairing-plug.seo_p3: Building managers and maintenance crews rely heavily on this tool to fix drill-hole damage without having to cut out and replace entire pipe sections. It provides a permanent, high-pressure repair that restores the system's integrity in minutes.

faq.q: Up to what size can a hole be repaired?
faq.a: The repair plug and the corresponding tool are designed for drilled holes up to approx. 10-12 mm in diameter.

faq.q: Does the pipe have to be completely empty for the repair?
faq.a: Yes, there must be no water in the pipe and there must be no pressure, otherwise the welding will fail.

faq.q: Can I only repair K Aqua pipes with it?
faq.a: The repair set is intended for all PP-R and PP-RCT pipes, but we only guarantee the tightness when used in our system.

repairing-plug.seo_p1: The Repairing Plug is a vital emergency consumable within our catalogue, designed to work seamlessly with our specialised repair welding tool to seal pipe punctures.
repairing-plug.seo_p2: Moulded from solid, high-grade PP-R, this tapered plug exactly matches the geometry of the repair heating tool. Once fused into the damaged pipe wall, it bonds at the molecular level, completely restoring the original pressure rating of the pipeline.
repairing-plug.seo_p3: It is the definitive solution for accidental damage caused during subsequent building works, such as drilling into concealed pipes. Using this plug avoids massive disruption, saving significant time and expense compared to traditional repair methods.

faq.q: Is the repair permanent?
faq.a: Yes, thanks to the homogeneous welding, the repaired area is as strong as the original pipe itself and lasts just as long.

faq.q: Can I use the repair plug for underfloor heating systems?
faq.a: Yes, the plug is also ideal for accidentally drilled heating pipes in the screed.

faq.q: Does the projecting rest of the plug have to be cut off?
faq.a: Yes, after cooling, the protruding part of the plug is cut off flush with the pipe wall with a pipe cutter or saw.

pipes.guideTitle: Comprehensive Guide: Planning and Installation of K Aqua PP-R & PPRCT Pipe Systems
pipes.guideText:
Comprehensive Guide: Planning, Materials Science and Installation of K Aqua PP-R & PPRCT Pipe Systems

Choosing the right pipe material is the crucial foundation for the longevity, operational reliability and energy efficiency of modern building and industrial infrastructures. Our PP-R and PPRCT pipe systems, manufactured in Germany (Waldsolms), offer the future-proof alternative to conventional metal pipes made of copper, steel or brass thanks to their excellent thermal, chemical and mechanical properties.

Whether in building services for drinking water and heating networks, in industrial plant construction, in cooling systems or in shipbuilding – K Aqua pipes stand for uncompromising German engineering and ensure absolutely leak-free and maintenance-free operation for decades.

Material Innovation: PP-R and PPRCT in Direct Comparison

While standard Polypropylene Random Copolymer (PP-R) already has excellent properties in terms of corrosion resistance and hygiene, the advanced PPRCT (Polypropylene Random Copolymer with Modified Crystallinity Temperature resistance) sets new standards in piping technology. Through a targeted modification of the crystal structure in the polymerization process, PPRCT offers significantly higher pressure resistance at elevated operating temperatures up to 95°C.

This material advantage makes it possible to produce pipes with significantly lower wall thicknesses (higher SDR classes) at the same nominal pressure. The results for the user are outstanding:

  • Increased hydraulic flow: A larger internal diameter increases the flow volume by up to 17% compared to standard PP-R pipes.
  • Reduced pipe weight: The saving of material considerably simplifies transport and handling on the construction site.
  • Higher pressure reserves: Maximum safety reserves even at peak loads in continuous hot water use.

Fiber Composite Technology (K-Fiber) for Minimal Linear Expansion

A central aspect in the planning of hot water and heating pipes is the thermal linear expansion of plastic pipes. K Aqua meets this challenge with the innovative K-Fiber composite technology. The three-layer K-Fiber pipes have a middle polypropylene layer reinforced with high-strength glass fibers.

This mechanical stabilization reduces the linear thermal expansion coefficient to exactly 0.035 mm/(m·K) – which corresponds to a reduction in thermal linear expansion of around 75% compared to non-reinforced solid plastic pipes. For specialist planners and installers, this means:

  • Fewer expansion compensators: Significant saving of bending legs and expansion loops in the pipeline routing.
  • Larger fastening distances: Saving of pipe clamps and fixed points during route planning.
  • Dimensionally stable installation: No sagging of the pipes in open routes or risers.

Homogeneous Polyfusion Welding: Leak Safety for 50+ Years

The heart of the K Aqua pipe system is the permanent, material-bonding connection technology through thermal polyfusion. During the welding process, the pipe end and the socket of the fitting are heated to exactly 260°C using an electronically controlled welding device. The polymer chains of both components melt at the joining surfaces.

When joined together, the melted macromolecules interlock completely at the molecular level. After cooling, a homogeneous, monolithic material structure is created without seams, adhesives or elastic seals. Since no rubber O-rings or mechanical press connections are used, aging damage, resinification or brittleness of seals are a thing of the past. The welded connection withstands the same pressures as the pipe itself.

Hydraulics, Hygiene and Environmental Compatibility

Drinking water safety and energy efficiency are top priorities at K Aqua. The mirror-smooth inner surface of our PP-R and PPRCT pipes has an extremely low roughness of only k = 0.007 mm. This effectively prevents the adhesion of limescale deposits (incrustation) and stops the formation of breeding grounds for biofilms and legionella.

In addition, the material polypropylene is physiologically completely harmless, tasteless and odorless, and free of heavy metals and plasticizers. K Aqua pipe systems are certified worldwide according to the strictest test standards (e.g. DVGW, KIWA, WRAS). The system is also ecologically convincing: The polymer is 100% recyclable and has an excellent ecological balance in the manufacturing process compared to metal pipes.

Important Installation and Planning Notes

To ensure flawless function over the guaranteed lifespan of 50 years, the following points must be observed during installation:

  • Pressure test: After completion of the assembly, the pipe network must be subjected to a pressure test in accordance with DIN 1988 / DIN EN 806.
  • Thermal insulation: Pipes for hot water and heating must be professionally insulated in accordance with the applicable energy saving regulations (e.g. GEG) in order to minimize heat losses.
  • UV protection: When installed outdoors, UV-protected pipes must be used or suitable covers provided.

faq.q: What distinguishes PPRCT from conventional PP-R in piping systems?
faq.a: PPRCT (Polypropylene Random Copolymer with Modified Crystallinity Temperature resistance) has a specially modified crystal structure that enables higher pressure resistance at elevated operating temperatures. This allows thinner-walled pipes to be used at the same nominal pressure, increasing the inner diameter and hydraulic flow capacity by up to 17%.

faq.q: How does K-Fiber composite technology reduce thermal linear expansion?
faq.a: Our K-Fiber pipes have an integrated middle layer of glass-fiber-reinforced polypropylene. This layer mechanically stabilizes the pipe and lowers the expansion coefficient to approx. 0.035 mm/(m·K). This corresponds to a 75% reduction in thermal linear expansion compared to standard plastic pipes.

faq.q: Are K Aqua PP-R pipe systems certified for drinking water?
faq.a: Yes, K Aqua pipe systems meet the strictest testing and hygiene requirements of international certification bodies such as DVGW, KIWA and WRAS. The material is completely harmless, tasteless and odorless, and effectively prevents limescale and biofilm formation.

faq.q: How is an absolutely leak-free welded connection made?
faq.a: The connection is made by thermal polyfusion at 260°C. Pipe and fitting fuse at the molecular level into a homogeneous, inseparable unit. Because no error-prone rubber seals or press fittings are used, the weld remains completely tight for over 50 years.

faq.q: What pressure classes and dimensions are available for K Aqua pipes?
faq.a: K Aqua offers pipe systems in the pressure classes SDR 6, SDR 7.4, SDR 9 and SDR 11 (PN10 to PN25) as well as in outer diameters from 20 mm to 250 mm. This makes it possible to realize fine-grained floor distributions as well as massive main and riser pipes.

fittings.guideTitle: Technical Guide: Secure Connections with K Aqua Fittings
fittings.guideText:
Fittings are the heart of every complex pipe network. With high-quality K Aqua PP-R fittings, you can realize installations that withstand the highest pressures and temperatures.

The advantages of homogeneous welding are undisputed:

  • Material-bonding connection: When heated, the fitting and pipe fuse into a single workpiece. This consistently eliminates weak points such as aging O-rings or mechanical compressions.
  • Flow optimization: Our fittings are designed so that the cross-section is maintained at the connection points. This minimizes turbulence and reduces the energy consumption of circulation pumps.
  • Highest material quality: The use of premium Polypropylene Random Copolymer achieves outstanding chemical and thermal resistance that far exceeds normative requirements.

During processing, attention must be paid to clean, burr-free cuts and strict adherence to heating and cooling times. This guarantees the maintenance-free operating time of over 50 years assured by the manufacturer in all installation areas.

valves.guideTitle: Expert Guide: System Control with K Aqua Valves and Fittings
valves.guideText:
Precise control and isolation of material flows is essential in modern water and heating networks. K Aqua shut-off valves and fittings combine the durability of polypropylene with the precision of metallic sealing and adjustment mechanisms.

What you need to know when integrating PP-R valves:

  • Dead-space-free design: To prevent stagnation water and germ formation (e.g. legionella), our valves have a flow-optimized and hygienic design, making them ideal for sensitive drinking water installations.
  • Pressure and temperature stability: The solid valve bodies and high-quality brass or PP balls ensure 100% sealing, even under extreme pressure shocks and high flow temperatures.
  • Ease of maintenance: Even after many years of continuous use, K Aqua ball valves and inclined seat valves can be operated smoothly and precisely thanks to Teflon-coated sealing elements.

For maximum system availability, we recommend positioning the valves strategically during the planning phase so that maintenance work and flushing processes can be carried out without extensive network interruptions.

transitionFittings.seoText: Transition fittings serve as the crucial bridge between advanced K Aqua PP-R/PPRCT pipes and existing steel, copper, or brass components. These fittings require an extraordinary level of engineering.
transitionFittings.guideText:
When connecting modern polymer systems to traditional metallic infrastructure, secure and homogeneous connections are absolutely paramount. Transition fittings serve as the crucial bridge between advanced K Aqua PP-R/PPRCT pipes and existing steel, copper, or brass components such as boilers, chillers, and sanitary fixtures. These fittings require an extraordinary level of engineering to ensure that the metal-to-plastic joint remains absolutely leak-tight, even under extreme thermal cycling and mechanical stress.

K Aqua transition fittings feature deeply embedded, anti-rotation DZR (Dezincification Resistant) brass inserts. During the injection molding process, the hot PP-R is formed directly around the complex geometric profile of the brass insert. As the plastic cools and shrinks, it grips the brass with immense force, forming an inseparable mechanical bond. This design prevents the brass insert from twisting or pulling out, even when subjected to the high torque of a plumber's wrench during installation.

Furthermore, the high-quality DZR brass ensures that the metallic part of the fitting is highly resistant to aggressive water conditions, preventing the premature corrosion that often plagues standard brass fittings. This is especially critical in hot water systems where reaction rates are significantly accelerated.

  • DZR brass inserts offer superior resistance to dezincification and corrosion.
  • Anti-rotation design easily withstands high torques during threaded installations.
  • Inseparable bond between plastic and metal ensures lifelong leak-free performance.
  • Available in a wide range of male and female threaded configurations.
  • Perfect for connecting PP-R networks to metallic pumps, valves, and boilers.

Whether you need to adapt a massive 125 mm industrial cooling line to a steel flange or simply connect a 20 mm residential water line to a chrome angle valve, K Aqua provides the exact transition piece required. Our extensive catalog includes straight adapters, threaded elbows, wall plate brackets, and robust metal unions, ensuring total versatility on the job site.

Trusting K Aqua transition fittings eliminates the weakest link in hybrid plumbing systems. Our uncompromising approach to manufacturing guarantees that the transition between metal and polymer is as strong and reliable as the pipe itself, providing peace of mind to both the installer and the end-user.

weldInSaddles.seoText: Weld-in Saddles for maximum flexibility are the perfect solution for subsequent branches in existing pipeline networks. Instead of laboriously cutting the main pipe and inserting T-pieces, the pipe is simply drilled into and the saddle is homogeneously welded on. This technology saves enormous installation times and material costs in industrial distribution systems.
weldInSaddles.guideTitle: Installation Guide: Flexibility through Weld-in Saddles
weldInSaddles.guideText:
Modifying or expanding existing industrial and commercial pipe networks often involves a great deal of effort. Here, K Aqua weld-in saddles offer an efficient and extremely secure solution for creating subsequent branches without line interruption.

The main technical advantages at a glance:

  • Minimal installation time: Instead of cutting the main pipe and installing conventional T-pieces, the pipe is simply drilled to fit exactly and the saddle is welded on. This drastically reduces installation costs.
  • Preservation of system integrity: Through polyfusion, the weld-in saddle bonds inseparably to the pipe wall, maintaining the system's original pressure and temperature resistance (up to PN 25).
  • Flexible connection options: Available as a pure plastic branch or with an integrated metal thread (female/male thread), saddles enable the direct connection of sensors, pressure gauges or branch lines in tight spaces.

To ensure a flawless weld, the use of special K Aqua drilling and welding tools is strictly necessary, as they guarantee the exact milling depth and heating surface for a perfect connection.

accessories.seoText: The right accessories range is crucial for the longevity of a pipe network. K Aqua offers a comprehensive accessories matrix: from thermodynamic fastening clamps to absorb linear expansion to EPDM flat gaskets for flange connections. Only with perfectly matched K Aqua accessories can you ensure compliance with all GEG and DIN 18381 regulations.
accessories.guideTitle: Expert Guide: K Aqua Accessories for Standard-Compliant Installations
accessories.guideText:
A high-quality pipe system requires equally high-quality accessories. The K Aqua range includes all essential components to ensure longevity, safety and compliance with all building physics standards.

The most important aspects of using our accessories correctly:

  • Compensation for linear expansion: Plastic pipes expand when temperatures change. The targeted use of our thermodynamic pipe clamps as fixed and sliding points safely absorbs these movements and protects the system from harmful internal stresses. This is particularly crucial in industrial plants and risers, where uncontrolled expansion could lead to structural damage.
  • Tight flange connections: For transitions to large valves, pumps or tanks, our loose flanges and precisely matched EPDM flat gaskets offer absolute safety at high contact pressures and continuous vibrations. They guarantee a seamless, liquid-tight connection, preventing potentially disastrous leaks in critical infrastructures.
  • Repair solutions: With our innovative repair plug, accidentally drilled pipes (e.g. on construction sites) can be homogeneously welded in minutes, restoring the pipe's full mechanical load capacity. A complete replacement of the pipe section is therefore unnecessary.

In addition to compensation and tightness, insulation and fire protection play a central role in professional installation. The K Aqua accessories range is designed to minimize thermal losses and meet the highest safety standards. Our special seals and fasteners are designed to effectively dampen sound transmission and prevent structure-borne noise propagation in the masonry.

By exclusively using original K Aqua accessories, you secure the full system warranty and avoid costly defects caused by incompatible third-party products. Invest in uncompromising quality to guarantee the trouble-free operation of your piping system for decades.

faq.q: Are the accessories suitable for cold and hot water?
faq.a: Yes, our accessories such as pipe clamps and flat gaskets are designed for use in cold water, hot water and heating systems and exhibit excellent thermal stability.

faq.q: Can I use third-party accessories?
faq.a: To claim the full K Aqua system warranty, it is mandatory to use original accessories. Third-party components can lead to sealing problems or mechanical failures.

faq.q: Are there special accessories for industrial use?
faq.a: Yes, our range includes heavy-duty loose flanges with steel cores, special EPDM seals and reinforced pipe clamps that can easily withstand extreme industrial loads.

tools.guideTitle: Practical Guide: Professional Tools for K Aqua Pipe Assembly
tools.guideText:
The quality of a plastic pipe installation stands or falls with the precision of the tools used. K Aqua welding and cutting tools are specifically tailored to the thermoplastic properties of PP-R and PPRCT to achieve flawless results.

Why professional equipment is indispensable:

  • Flawless preparation: An absolutely rectangular and burr-free cut is the basic prerequisite for a tight weld. Our pipe cutters and cold circular saws prevent material compression and micro-cracks.
  • Thermodynamic precision: The microprocessor-controlled socket welding devices maintain the ideal joining temperature of 260°C constant even under adverse weather conditions, reliably preventing polymer degradation.
  • Automated safety: For large nominal diameters, our computer-controlled butt welding and electrofusion welding machines eliminate human error by fully automatically regulating pressure, time and temperature and documenting them digitally for site acceptance.

Regular maintenance and cleaning of the Teflon-coated heating mandrels is essential to ensure a homogeneous melt and permanently resilient, leak-free pipe networks.

tools.scrollLead: Discover the technological details that make our tools the first choice for tested installers.
tools.scroll1Desc: Our heating element socket welding devices are equipped with high-precision, Teflon-coated heating mandrels and heating bushes. The microprocessor-controlled temperature regulation guarantees a constant welding temperature of 260°C – even in extreme outside temperatures on global construction sites. This creates an inseparable, homogeneous connection at the molecular level.

Each welding cycle is digitally logged to ensure complete traceability for building acceptance. German Engineering at the highest level.
tools.scroll3Title: Precision pipe peelers. Accurate to the millimetre.
tools.scroll3Desc: Preparation is 80% of the weld. Our mechanical and electrical pipe peelers remove the oxide layer from K-Aqua pipes with an absolutely uniform cutting depth. This prevents micro-cracks and creates a perfect fusion plane. A tool that will last for generations.
tools.scroll4Title: Cold circular saws for exact cuts.
tools.scroll4Desc: Pipe shears can deform the material. Our industrial cold circular saws guarantee perfectly right-angled, burr-free cuts. The result: No stress-induced cracks, no pressure loss, absolute plane parallelism before the welding process.
tools.timelineDesc: From cutting to molecular fusion. A standardised process that leads to 100% leak-proof and maintenance-free pipe systems.
tools.timeline1Text: A burr-free, 90-degree cut is the foundation of any permanent connection. Our precision cutters and cold circular saws guarantee an absolutely flat surface without microstructural deformation of the polypropylene.
tools.timeline2Text: Before welding, the pipe is exactly calibrated and the outer oxide layer is removed to the millimetre using our special peeling tools. This enables a 100% pure surface for the fusion process.
tools.timeline3Text: Pipe and fitting are simultaneously heated to exactly 260°C on the Teflon-coated heating matrix. The microprocessor-controlled thermostat of the K-Aqua welding devices keeps the temperature constant – regardless of wind or weather.
tools.timeline4Text: Within the specified changeover time, the heated components are joined together without twisting. After the cooling phase, a new, absolutely homogeneous workpiece is created. Maintenance-free for over 50 years.

When the material yields, the system breaks.
We do not yield.
valves.manifestoP1: In industrial fluid engineering, a valve is never just a switch for liquids. It is the critical junction where kinetic energy, extreme pressure, thermal expansion, and chemical aggressiveness collide.
valves.manifestoP2: This is where banal mass-produced goods separate from true engineering art. Our valves are massively over-engineered, manufactured with paranoid precision, and built for scenarios that other manufacturers would call "impossible". This is what we understand by German Engineering.
valves.scrollTitle: From raw material to an indestructible valve.
valves.scrollLead: Accompany the creation process of a K-Aqua valve. An uncompromising path through heat, pressure, and microscopic precision.
valves.scroll1Desc: Our valves and fittings begin their existence as pure, industrially tested high-performance material. Through strict spectral analytical investigations, we guarantee even before the first milling head is used that there are absolutely no microstructural weak points. This is the non-negotiable foundation for the later absolute corrosion resistance and mechanical integrity in years of continuous use.
valves.scroll2Desc: Every single component is manufactured from solid material in our factory on state-of-the-art 5-axis CNC machining centres with an absurd tolerance of less than a thousandth of a millimetre. This uncompromising precision ensures that sealing surfaces lie perfectly on top of each other. It completely eliminates leakage risks and guarantees absolutely smooth, silky-soft, and wear-free operation – even after decades.
valves.scroll3Desc: A valve is only as good as its internal flow profile. Using advanced computational fluid dynamics (CFD), we have designed the internal contours so that turbulence and cavitation are virtually eliminated. This means less pressure loss in the overall system and absolute noise minimisation even at the highest flow velocities.
valves.scroll4Desc: Random samples are not enough when billion-dollar infrastructures are at stake. Before a valve leaves the K-Aqua factory, it is subjected to a fully automated, robotic test cycle that exceeds real loads many times over. Hydraulic high-pressure tests, helium vacuum leak tests, and thermal shock tests guarantee our legendary zero-defect rate.
valves.showcaseTitle:
No weak points.
No blind spots.
valves.showcaseP1: The internal architecture of our valves is consistently trimmed for zero dead space. Stagnation zones where bacteria such as legionella could multiply are geometrically eliminated.
valves.showcaseP2: The water shoots through the valve body in a perfectly guided laminar flow. The solid sealing seats are self-cleaning and close hermetically even after the millionth cycle.
valves.showcaseList1: tested drinking water hygiene according to highest standards
valves.showcaseList2: Hermetic sealing at maximum operating pressure
valves.showcaseList3: Maintenance-free spindle seals with double O-ring
valves.bentoLead: When marketing phrases end, the data speaks. Discover the technical parameters that make our valves the ultimate choice for megaprojects.
valves.bento1Desc: Developed for continuous high-pressure applications beyond the norm. The wall thicknesses and thread designs are so massively dimensioned that they do not yield in the slightest, even with extreme pressure peaks and water hammer. A monolithic block of safety.
valves.bento2Desc: From icy cold to boiling flow temperatures. The high-end material retains its full elasticity, does not become brittle, and resists thermal expansion extremely effectively.
valves.bento3Desc: Corrosion is a concept from the past. Our valves are immune to aggressive soil conditions, hard water, and chlorine-containing disinfection measures. No rusting, no pitting.
valves.bento4Desc: Design meets raw functionality. The solid handwheels, massive levers, and precisely crafted spindles provide immediate, tactile, and absolutely precise feedback when closing and opening, even with heavy protective gloves.
valves.timelineLead: A timeline of uncompromising quality assurance. How an idea becomes an industrial legend.
valves.timeline1Text: Selection of metallic alloys and high-performance polymers specifically formulated for K-Aqua. We rely on absolute creep resistance and maximum molecular stability.
valves.timeline2Text: Using supercomputers, the inner flow channels are calculated in thousands of iterations to minimise flow resistance to zero.
valves.timeline3Text: Prototypes undergo months of endurance tests in our climate chambers at up to 120°C, 25 bar pressure, and extreme chemical solutions.
valves.timeline4Text: The transfer to our highly automated Industry 4.0 production line. We achieve maximum reproducibility with minimal tolerances without human sources of error.
valves.timeline5Text: Deployment on the most critical construction sites in the world - from desert megaprojects to offshore facilities. Accompanied by our field engineering team.
valves.finalTitle:
Build for generations.
Not for the next maintenance interval.
valves.finalDesc: In a world that increasingly relies on rapid obsolescence and cheap replacement products, we stand as a steely counterpole. A K-Aqua valve is installed – and then forgotten. Because it simply works. Decade after decade. Trust in true industrial authority.
valves.ctaDesc: Talk to our chief engineers about the specifications of your next megaproject. We deliver the solutions for problems that others have not even understood yet.

meta.title: Fittings & Form Parts | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua Fittings & Form Parts – Uncompromising safety through German Engineering for global megaprojects.

hero.title: PP-R Fittings & Molded Parts for Permanently Tight Joints
hero.lead: From elbows to reducers: K-Aqua PP-R fittings fuse molecularly with the pipe during welding — a homogeneous system with no gaskets and no weak points.

intro.title: Safety is no coincidence. It is calculable.
intro.lead: When international general contractors plan billion-dollar projects, they don't trust promises, but hard facts. We set the standard that the rest of the world follows.
intro.text1: For decades, we have been combining pride in craftsmanship with state-of-the-art, highly automated manufacturing technology at our main plant in the heart of Germany. Every elbow, every socket, every T-piece carries the unmistakable DNA of German engineering. Deployed in the harshest deserts, the most extreme climate zones, and the most demanding industrial facilities in the world, our material proves itself anew every day.
intro.text2: The fusion of macromolecules in our PP-R system creates a pipeline network without weak points. There are no sealing rings that can corrode, no glued joints that can be attacked by chemicals. The pipe and the fitting are thermally fused into a single, inseparable workpiece. This is the absolute definition of safety.

sticky.title: The Anatomy of Reliability.
sticky.lead: A deep dive into the physical and chemical properties that make our fittings the global benchmark.

items.title: The molecular structure
items.desc: Our fittings are based on a highly cross-linked PP-R polypropylene random copolymer. Through controlled temperature-pressure profiles during extrusion, we achieve an isotropic crystal structure. The result: Unprecedented resistance to stress cracks and extreme temperature fluctuations.

items.title: Thermoplastic Precision
items.desc: Every moulded part undergoes a thermoplastic injection moulding process with cavity tolerances in the micrometre range. This ensures that the melt indices when welding with our pipes are absolutely identical – for a homogeneous, inseparable, and 100% leak-free material connection.

items.title: Zero-Defect Tolerance
items.desc: We leave nothing to chance. Using ultrasonic wall thickness measurement, hydrostatic internal pressure creep tests, and DSC (Differential Scanning Calorimetry), every batch is analysed. Only material that exceeds our internal standards – which are far above DIN EN ISO 15874 – is released.

items.title: Cavitation Resistance
items.desc: The flow-optimised internal geometry of our fittings effectively prevents pressure drops and cavitation, even at extreme flow velocities in industrial risers. This minimises noise emissions and protects the system from abrasive wear from the inside.

bento.title: Specifications beyond the standard.
bento.lead: While the industry considers norms as a target, we see them merely as the absolute minimum.

items.title: DIN EN ISO 15874
items.desc: Full compliance and certification for plastic piping systems for hot and cold water installations.

items.title: PN 20 / PN 25
items.desc: Designed for permanent high-pressure loads even at critical temperatures.

items.title: Chemical Inertness
items.desc: Outstanding resistance to aggressive media. pH-independent (pH 1 to 14) for industrial use.

items.title: Acoustic Damping
items.desc: The inherent elasticity of the PP-R material absorbs structure-borne noise and reduces flow noise to an absolute minimum, ideal for luxury hotels and hospitals.

timeline.title: The Genesis Process
timeline.desc: From the molecular raw mass to the indestructible component. A look into our highly automated manufacturing matrix.

items.title: Granulate Selection
items.text: Only high-purity, pre-synthesized polypropylene granulate from premium European refineries passes our incoming goods inspection.

items.title: Thermal Conditioning
items.text: Before injection molding, the granulate is thermally stabilized to eliminate residual moisture and guarantee a homogeneous melt.

items.title: High-Pressure Injection Molding
items.text: In fully automated, robot-assisted injection molding cells, we shape the material under enormous pressure into flawless fittings.

items.title: Cooling Matrix
items.text: A computer-controlled cooling profile prevents internal stresses in the material and ensures perfect dimensional stability.

items.title: Certification & Logistics
items.text: Every batch receives its digital certificate. Ready for dispatch to the most demanding construction sites in the world.

depth.title: Lifespan > 50 Years. Guaranteed.
depth.text: Time is the ultimate stress test for any material. Our fittings are designed to outlast the lifespan of the building itself. By adding special antioxidants and thermal stabilizers to our PP-R matrix, thermal-oxidative aging is massively delayed. Even at continuous flow temperatures of 70°C and pressure loads of 10 bar, we guarantee a service life of over half a century. That is not marketing. That is applied polymer physics.

cta.title: Ready for uncompromising quality?
cta.desc: Connect with our engineering team. We don't just deliver products, we deliver security for your next megaproject.

meta.title: PP-R & PP-RCT pipe systems | K-Aqua
meta.desc: High-performance pipe systems made of PP-R and PP-RCT. German engineering for drinking water, climate and industry. Uncompromising security for megaprojects.

hero.title: PP-R & PP-RCT Pipes from d20 to d630
hero.lead: K-Aqua PP-R pipes and PP-RCT multilayer pipes for drinking water, heating and industry: mono and fiber-composite versions in every pressure class — made in Germany to DIN 8077/8078.

sticky.title: Polymer engineering to perfection.
sticky.lead: The molecular structure of our PP-R and PP-RCT pipes has been optimized for extreme thermomechanical loads. A masterpiece of German engineering.

items.title: PP-RCT multilayer architecture
items.desc: Our latest generation PP-RCT (Polypropylene Random Copolymers with modified Crystallinity and Temperature resistance) pipes have an integrated glass fiber compound layer. This reduces the thermal linear expansion by up to 75% compared to standard PP-R pipes, while the pressure resistance at high temperatures is drastically increased. The result is thinner wall thicknesses with increased flow capacity.

items.title: Homogeneous welding
items.desc: In contrast to press fittings or adhesive connections, we use the polyfusion welding process. Pipe and fitting fuse at 260°C to form a single, inseparable molecular unit. The system works completely without O-rings or mechanical seals. The connection point is physically stronger than the pipe itself - a 100% leak-free service life is guaranteed.

items.title: Absolute freedom from corrosion
items.desc: Metallic systems capitulate to aggressive water qualities, low pH values ​​or high chloride contents. K-Aqua polymer pipes are completely inert. Pitting, crevice corrosion, galvanic corrosion or incrustations are physically impossible. The pipe friction loss (roughness value k=0.007 mm) remains at the same level as the first day even after 50 years of operation, which massively reduces the pump energy.

items.title: Thermal and acoustic insulation
items.desc: Thanks to the low thermal conductivity of PP-R (0.24 W/mK) compared to steel (50 W/mK) or copper (380 W/mK), the formation of condensation in cooling systems is greatly delayed and heat losses in heating systems are minimized. In addition, our thick-walled polymer pipes efficiently absorb flow noise and water hammers, perfecting the acoustic comfort in high-rise buildings and hotels.

timeline.title: Zero error tolerance
timeline.desc: Every centimeter of our pipes is monitored during the extrusion process. From the granulate to the finished product – quality Made in Germany.

items.title: Premium raw material
items.text: We only process high-purity PP-R and PP-RCT granules from the world's leading polymer manufacturers. Each batch undergoes an MFR test (melt flow rate) and an oxidative induction time measurement (OIT) in our in-house laboratory before being released for extrusion.

items.title: Precision extrusion
items.text: Our state-of-the-art extrusion systems produce 3-layer fibre composite pipes with micrometre precision. Ultrasonic wall thickness measurement in real time over 360° ensures that even with SDR 6 pipes the minimum permissible tolerances are not met.

items.title: Thermal conditioning
items.text: Immediately after extrusion, the pipes are gradually cooled down in specially tempered water baths. This gentle cooling process prevents internal stresses in the material and ensures maximum dimensional stability across all dimensions.

items.title: 100% traceability
items.text: Each tube receives an indelible laser imprint with exact batch and production time information. Even after decades in the wall, the origin of every K-Aqua pipe can be completely traced back to the granulate batch.

items.title: Certification & Release
items.text: Hydraulic burst pressure test at 95°C for 1000 hours. Tensile tests, notched impact strength and toxicological safety testing. Only if the product exceeds all standards (DIN 8077/8078, EN ISO 15874) does it leave our workshop.

bento.title: A dimension for every requirement.
bento.lead: Scalable from d20 house connections to d500 industrial risers. Our system grows with the dimensions of your project.

items.title: Dimensions from d20 to d500
items.desc: Complete portfolio of pipes and fittings. No matter whether T-pieces, reductions or flange connections in gigantic dimensions – we supply the complete system from a single source. No compromises when it comes to hydraulics.

items.title: SDR grades 6 to 11
items.desc: Tailored pressure levels (PN10 to PN25) through various standard dimension ratios. Optimise material usage and flow.

items.title: Drinking water hygiene
items.desc: Complies with the strictest European standards (UBA, DVGW). Absolutely food-safe, tasteless and odourless. Optional antibacterial interior coating.

items.title: UV-resistant outer tubes
items.desc: We offer special UV-stabilised pipes for outdoor installations in extreme climate zones (e.g. Middle East). The protective outer layer blocks UV radiation and prevents polymer degradation.

cta.title: Let experts size your project.
cta.desc: Send us your isometrics or P&ID plans. Our engineering team takes care of the hydraulic calculation and bill of materials creation for your large project.

meta.title: Transition Fittings | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua Transition Fittings – hybrid connectivity of the absolute highest class. Where high-strength metal meets innovative plastic. German Engineering.

hero.title: Transition Fittings: Safely from Metal to PP-R
hero.lead: Brass meets polymer: K-Aqua transition fittings connect existing metal pipework to the PP-R system permanently tight and corrosion-free — tested far beyond the standard.

intro.title: Where worlds collide.
intro.lead: The transition from rigid metallic piping systems to modern thermoplastic networks is the Achilles heel of any building and industrial installation. This is where maximum thermal and mechanical shear forces act.

sticky.title: Anatomy of indestructibility.
sticky.lead: We consider a transition fitting not as an accessory, but as a highly complex mechanical instrument. Every millimetre of wall thickness, every thread is the result of countless finite element analyses (FEA).

items.title: The symbiosis of metal and polymer
items.desc: Our transition fittings combine the relentless mechanical strength of dezincification-resistant CW617N brass with the chemical inertness of PP-RCT. This material fusion is not created by simple pressing, but by a thermomechanical injection moulding process that achieves an inseparable molecular interlocking.

items.title: Extreme torsion and torque
items.desc: A critical failure criterion for standard fittings is torque overload during installation. K-Aqua transition fittings integrate a patented hexagonal anchoring profile in the polymer jacket. The result: over 300 Nm guaranteed torsional resistance without delamination of the boundary layer.

items.title: Thermal expansion coefficients in balance
items.desc: Metals and plastics expand differently with temperature fluctuations (Δα). Through precisely calculated micro-expansion joints in the brass insert, our fittings compensate for extreme shocks from -20°C to +95°C in milliseconds – absolutely leak-free.

items.title: Zero-tolerance quality control
items.desc: Jedes einzelne Hybrid-Bauteil durchläuft einen vollautomatisierten Helium-Leckagetest und eine optische 3D-Vermessung. Wenn der Grenzwert von 10^-5 mbar·l/s auch nur ansatzweise tangiert wird, schließt unsere Anlage das Teil rigoros aus. German Engineering duldet keine Kompromisse.

bento.title: Architektur der Leistung.
bento.lead: Wenn Sie Megaprojekte mit zehntausenden Verbindungen planen, ist statistische Ausfallsicherheit der wichtigste ROI. K-Aqua liefert Ihnen die physikalische Garantie dafür.

items.title: DZR Brass Core
items.desc: Entzinkungsbeständiges Messing der Güteklasse CW617N (nach DIN EN 12164) eliminiert das Risiko von selektiver Korrosion in aggressiven Wasserqualitäten.

items.title: Anti-Rotation Design
items.desc: Polygonale Hinterschneidungen formen einen geometrischen Lock, der extreme Anzugsmomente aufnimmt, ohne den Kunststoffmantel zu belasten.

items.title: Tiefgezogenes Gewinde
items.desc: Konische und zylindrische ISO 7/1 bzw. ISO 228 Gewinde, maschinell mit einer Toleranz von ±0.01mm geschnitten für perfekte Dichtigkeit.

items.title: PP-RCT Matrix
items.desc: Die hochkristalline Struktur unseres Polypropylen Random-Copolymers bietet überragende Langzeit-Zeitstandfestigkeit bei hohen Temperaturen.

timeline.title: Der Fertigungszyklus
timeline.desc: Ein Blick in unsere Manufaktur. Der Weg vom Rohmaterial zum geprüften Hybrid-Fitting ist ein Orchester aus Hitze, Druck und gnadenloser Präzision.

items.title: Rohteilbearbeitung (CW617N)
items.text: Das Messing wird bei 750°C in hochpräzise Matrizen gepresst, gefolgt von einer CNC-gesteuerten Zerspanung im Mikrometerbereich zur Erzeugung des Dichtprofils.

items.title: Oberflächenpassivierung
items.text: Um galvanische Korrosion zu eliminieren, durchlaufen die Gewindeeinsätze einen mehrstufigen Passivierungsprozess in elektrolytischen Ultraschallbädern.

items.title: Umspritzen (Injection Molding)
items.text: In Hochdruck-Spritzgussmaschinen (2.000 bar) umschließt das schmelzflüssige PP-RCT das Messing. Der Kunststoff füllt jede Hinterschneidung komplett aus.

items.title: Kontrollierte Abkühlung
items.text: Ein programmierter, stufenweiser Temperaturabbau verhindert Eigenspannungen im Kunststoffgitter und sichert die konzentrische Formtreue des Fittings.

items.title: Druck- & Torsionsprüfung
items.text: Stichprobenartige Bersttests bis zu 120 bar sowie Dauerschwingversuche simulieren 50 Jahre aggressivste industrielle Dauerbelastung.

stats.title: Harte Fakten.
stats.lead: Wir testen nicht nur nach Norm. Wir definieren sie. Unsere internen Prüfprotokolle überschreiten die Anforderungen von DVGW, SKZ und ISO um bis zu 300%.

cta.title: Die stärkste Verbindung Ihres Projekts.
cta.desc: Verlassen Sie sich auf bewährte deutsche Ingenieurskunst. Kontaktieren Sie uns für technische Datenblätter, BIM-Modelle oder eine individuelle Projektberatung.

hero.desc: Precision at the molecular level. Designed to last. Our pipe systems, fittings and valves define the global standard for industrial and civil water infrastructure. No compromises. Just pure performance.

sticky.title: UNCOMPROMISING ENGINEERING.
sticky.lead: Every component is part of a closed, perfect system. From inlet to end point, we control the flow of water, chemicals and gases with relentless reliability.

items.title: PPR PIPING SYSTEMS: INDESTRUCTIBLE VEINS
items.desc: The K-Aqua PPR system (Polypropylene Random Copolymer) is the backbone of modern liquid transport. Thermally fused into a homogeneous unit, it resists extreme pressures, chemical attacks and thermal stress. A system that doesn't leak, doesn't corrode and lasts for decades.

items.title: FITTINGS: GEOMETRIC PERFECTION
items.desc: Every K-Aqua fitting is a masterpiece of fluid mechanics. Reduced cavitation, optimized wall thicknesses and exact tolerances in the micrometer range guarantee minimal pressure losses and maximum system safety. We don't leave the river to chance.

items.title: VALVES & FITTINGS: ABSOLUTE CONTROL
items.desc: Industrial isolation and control technology that operates under the harshest conditions worldwide. Our ball valves, angle seat valves and backflow preventers are tested for tens of thousands of cycles without any loss of performance. Maximum tightness under maximum load.

items.title: COMPOSITE PIPES: THE SYNERGY OF MATERIALS
items.desc: Aluminum meets high-performance polymer. The K-Aqua multilayer composite pipes combine the mechanical stability of metal with the flexibility and chemical resistance of plastic. 100% oxygen tight. Minimum linear expansion. The ultimate solution for complex HVAC systems.

bento.title: TECHNOLOGICAL SUPERIORITY. DATA-DRIVEN.
bento.lead: K-Aqua systems are not just pipes – they are high-performance networks for liquids. Developed according to the strictest German industry standards.

items.title: Thermal fusion
items.desc: Homogeneous weld seams. The material becomes one. No glue, no sealing rings to fail. 100% security against leakage on a molecular basis.

items.title: Corrosion immunity
items.desc: Completely resistant to pitting, rust and electrochemical corrosion. The transported medium remains in its purest state.

items.title: Flow optimization
items.desc: Smooth wall technology (roughness 0.007 mm) with minimal coefficient of friction prevents deposits and massively minimizes pressure loss.

items.title: Pressure resistance PN25+
items.desc: Designed for maximum use in high-rise buildings, industrial facilities and critical infrastructure. Designed for trouble-free operation for over 50 years.

timeline.title: THE INSTALLATION PROCESS. REDEFINED.
timeline.desc: Faster. Safer. Cleaner. Our system dramatically reduces installation time while keeping sources of error to a minimum. A chronology of efficiency.

items.title: PLANNING & DIMENSIONING
items.text: Exact hydraulic calculation and design of the pipe diameters. Avoidance of oversizing through superior flow properties.

items.title: CUTTING & PREPARATION
items.text: Cold and chip-free cutting of pipes. Absolutely clean cut edges guarantee perfect welding preparation without risk of contamination.

items.title: HEATING ELEMENT SOCKET WELDING
items.text: The tool heats the pipe and fitting to exactly 260°C. In seconds, a molecular connection is created that cannot be broken.

items.title: PRESSURE TEST & ACCEPTANCE
items.text: The system is placed under extreme test pressure. No tolerance for leaks. K-Aqua delivers 100% safety from the first drop.

items.title: OPERATION FOR DECADES
items.text: Maintenance free. Low noise. The system works behind the scenes of the world's most modern buildings with unrelenting reliability.

solutions.lead: Why polypropylene is the right material for tomorrow’s water supply — ecologically, technically and economically.

benefits.d: Polypropylene is made from gases that used to be burned off uselessly — drastically reducing air pollution. Production uses water in a closed cooling loop, protecting rivers, streams and lakes.
PP carries recycling code "5" and can be separated by type. We recycle all production waste and offcuts — amid high demand for PP recyclate.
As an engineering plastic, PP is unusually resistant to solvents, alkalis and acids — and injection-moulds complex geometries at low cost and high volume.
PP products last significantly longer than comparable materials: low-maintenance, wear-resistant and stable against ageing and temperature extremes.

solutions.nextLead: See how these material benefits become concrete in the K-Aqua product range.

items.title: Legionella prevention at the molecular level
items.desc: In critical hospital infrastructure, water hygiene is not an option, but a question of survival. Our K-Aqua pipe systems use extremely smooth, pore-free internal surfaces that physically prevent the formation of biofilms and the proliferation of Legionella. German engineering here means: prevention through perfect materials science, not through chemical post-treatment.

items.title: Thermal disinfection without material fatigue
items.desc: Clinical standards require regular thermal disinfection at temperatures above 70°C. While conventional systems age quickly, the K-Aqua PPR system is designed to withstand extreme thermal loads over decades. No microcracks, no brittleness, no compromises.

items.title: Absolutely sterile connections
items.desc: Our patented heating element socket welding fuses pipe and fitting into a homogeneous, completely seamless unit. There are no dead spaces in which stagnant water could collect. The result is a pipe system made from one piece - the absolute physical barrier against contamination.

items.title: Acoustic isolation for intensive care units
items.desc: Noise is a massive stress factor for patients and medical staff. The K-Aqua system has inherent sound-absorbing properties. Flow noises and pressure surges are absorbed by the material itself, which guarantees a whisper-quiet water supply even in high-pressure applications - essential for operating rooms and intensive care units.

items.title: System sizing & hydraulics
items.text: Precise calculation of the cable cross-sections to avoid stagnation zones. Every millimeter of pressure loss is simulated and eliminated by our German engineers on the digital twin during the planning phase.

items.title: Material specification
items.text: Selection of specific K-Aqua polymer blends, optimized for clinical requirements. Our raw materials go through 42 quality assurance steps before they even reach the extruder.

items.title: Prefabrication & cleanroom handling
items.text: Pre-assembly of complex distributors in controlled environments. Minimizing weld seams on the construction site guarantees up to 40% faster, error-free installation under clean room conditions.

items.title: Commissioning & Certification
items.text: Complete hydrostatic pressure testing and initial thermal disinfection. The handover to the general contractor takes place with complete, digital documentation of every single weld seam.

items.title: 50 years of maintenance freedom
items.text: After commissioning, the system disappears into the wall and carries out its work silently and absolutely reliably - guaranteed for at least 50 years without any material fatigue.

hero.desc: In maximum medical care, the infrastructure decides between life and death. K-Aqua provides the hydrological nervous system for the world's most advanced clinical megaprojects. Made in Germany. Built to last.

intro.title: Where a drop of water <br className="hidden md:block"/> causes the system to collapse.
intro.desc: General contractors are faced with an insoluble paradox when it comes to hospital projects: enormous time pressure during construction meets the strictest hygienic requirements in human history. A single dead space in the pipe network, a microscopic crack, a corroding connection – and investments worth millions are at risk. We solve this paradox through pure, uncompromising German engineering.

stickySection.title: The Anatomy of Security.
stickySection.lead: We view a hospital not as a building, but as a biological organism. The K-Aqua System is his indestructible vascular system. Every millimetre of our pipelines is calibrated for absolute reliability.

bentoSection.title: Efficiency through perfection.
bentoSection.lead: Quality is not a cost factor, but the only path to profitability in building automation. K-Aqua minimises the total cost of ownership to an unprecedented level while guaranteeing maximum patient safety.

items.title: 100% corrosion resistance
items.desc: In contrast to metallic pipes, K-Aqua is completely immune to electrochemical corrosion, pitting and hard water. No incrustation, no pressure loss over 50 years of continuous operation.

items.title: Lightning-fast installation
items.desc: The low weight and the homogeneous welding technology reduce installation time by up to 40%. Fewer man-days, less risk on the construction site.

items.title: Earthquake-proof flexibility
items.desc: The material's modular molecular structure allows it to absorb seismic shocks and building settlements without breaking. Essential for hospitals in risk areas.

items.title: tested drinking water quality
items.desc: Meets and exceeds the world's strictest standards (DIN, DVGW, SKZ, WRAS) for the transport of ultrapure water and highly sensitive clinical media.

timelineSection.desc: From the first CAD drawing to the last drop of water – our process is a symphony of precision that leaves no room for chance.

textSection.title: Die Ingenieurskunst hinter der Stille
textSection.p1: In Wolkenkratzern und weitläufigen Resort-Anlagen herrschen extreme physikalische Bedingungen. Wasserdruck, der hunderte Meter in die Höhe gepumpt wird. Temperaturdifferenzen, die traditionelle Materialien an ihre Belastungsgrenzen bringen.
textSection.p2: Traditionelle Kupfersysteme weisen bei hohen Fließgeschwindigkeiten signifikante Erosionserscheinungen auf. Die Kavitation, verursacht durch Druckschwankungen in Steigleitungen von Hochhaushotels, führt unweigerlich zu Mikrorissen, Lochfraß und letztlich zu katastrophalen Wasserschäden, die ganze Etagen lahmlegen können. Für einen Hotelbetreiber bedeutet dies nicht nur massive Sanierungskosten, sondern einen irreparablen Reputationsverlust.
textSection.p3: K-Aqua geht einen radikal anderen Weg.
textSection.p4: Unsere Systeme basieren auf Polypropylen Random-Copolymerisat (PP-R) der neuesten Generation. Durch einen hochkomplexen Extrusionsprozess in unserem deutschen Stammwerk richten wir die Polymerketten so aus, dass sie eine beispiellose Kombination aus Flexibilität und extremer Druckresistenz aufweisen. Wenn es im System zu Druckschlägen (Water Hammer) kommt, fängt das Material diese kinetische Energie elastisch ab, anstatt sie als akustischen Schock oder mechanischen Riss an die Bausubstanz weiterzugeben.
textSection.h3: Homogene Schweißverbindungen: Das Ende der Leckage
textSection.p5: Das schwächste Glied in jedem Rohrleitungssystem ist die Verbindung. Gewinde korrodieren, Dichtungsringe werden porös, Klebeverbindungen ermüden durch thermische Zyklisierung.
textSection.p6: Wir nutzen das Prinzip der molekularen Fusion. Rohr und Fitting werden thermisch auf exakt 260°C erhitzt und anschließend zusammengefügt. Innerhalb von Sekundenbruchteilen verschmelzen die Polymerketten beider Bauteile zu einer unzertrennlichen, monolithischen Einheit. Das Resultat: Es gibt keine "Verbindung" mehr. Rohr und Fitting sind ein einziges, durchgehendes Stück Material. Ohne Dichtung, ohne Schwachstelle, mit einer Ausfallsicherheit von 100%.

stickySection.title: Die DNA eines Masterpieces.
stickySection.lead: Wie wir die größten Herausforderungen der modernen Hotel-Infrastruktur durch radikale Ingenieurskunst lösen.

items.title: 1. Legionellen-Prävention auf Molekularebene
items.p1: In ausgedehnten Hotelnetzwerken kann stagnierendes Wasser in temporär ungenutzten Suiten zur tödlichen Falle werden. Legionellen proliferieren in Biofilmen, die sich an rauen Rohrwänden bilden.
items.p2: Die mikroskopische Oberflächenrauheit von K-Aqua PP-R liegt bei 0.007 mm. Es gibt keine Poren, keine Nischen, keine Ankerpunkte. In Kombination mit thermischer Desinfektion bieten wir das sterilste Umfeld, das physikalisch möglich ist.

items.title: 2. Absolute Schallabsorption
items.p1: Jedes Dezibel zählt. In Luxusresorts darf der Toilettenspülvorgang oder das Duschen in der Nachbarsuite nicht wahrnehmbar sein.
items.p2: Durch die hohe Dichte unseres Verbundmaterials (K-Aqua Faserverbund) und den hohen inneren Dämpfungsfaktor reduzieren wir den Körperschall um bis zu 80% gegenüber metallischen Systemen. Ein Unterschied, den Ihre Gäste nicht hören werden.

items.title: 3. Hochdruck-Resilienz in Skyscrapern
items.p1: Hotels mit 80, 100 oder 120 Stockwerken stellen extreme Anforderungen an die Steigleitungen. Der hydrostatische Druck im unteren Bereich des Gebäudes ist enorm.
items.p2: K-Aqua bietet spezielle Druckstufen (SDR 6 / PN 20) in Kombination mit Faserverstärkung, die auch bei Temperaturen von 70°C eine Lebensdauer von über 50 Jahren unter Dauerlast garantieren. Wir bezwingen die Schwerkraft.

items.title: 4. Thermal Management & District Cooling
items.p1: In Wüstenregionen wie Dubai oder Riad ist Kälte das teuerste Gut. District Cooling Systeme transportieren gekühltes Wasser über weite Strecken zum Resort.
items.p2: Die exzellenten Isolationswerte von PP-R verhindern Kondensatbildung und minimieren den Kühlverlust massiv. Keine durchgerosteten Chiller-Pipes mehr, keine tropfenden Decken. Nur reine, unverfälschte Effizienz.

intro.title: Why the global market trusts K-Aqua.
intro.lead: When you're designing a building that scrapes the sky or a hospital where every second counts, you can't rely on the variables of site manufacturing. You need the clinical precision of industrial prefabrication.
intro.p1: In the modern construction industry, time, quality and safety are the most valuable resources. Traditional pipe assembly on the construction site involves incalculable risks: weather conditions, varying quality of craftsmanship, lack of space and unforeseeable delays. K-Aqua completely eliminates these variables.
intro.p2: Our prefabrication solutions transform the unpredictable craft of pipe installation into a highly controlled, industrial process. There are optimal conditions in our German production facilities. Temperature, humidity, cleanliness – everything is precisely tailored to the welding process of our PPR-C (Polypropylene Random Copolymer) systems.
intro.quote: "We don't sell pipes. We sell the absolute certainty that a system will function maintenance-free for the next 50 years."
intro.p3: From complex distribution stations to risers to tailor-made special solutions for industrial cooling systems - we manufacture according to your ISO drawings or develop the optimal digital twin together with your engineering team, which is then implemented into physical reality.

items.title: Billion dollar projects do not forgive mistakes.

items.title: Digital precision meets German engineering.

items.title: Homogeneous fusion at the molecular level.
items.desc: In contrast to mechanical connections or glued systems, we use the most advanced thermal polyfusion welding processes. Pipe and fitting merge into a single, inseparable unit. The result is a cohesive connection that is stronger than the actual pipe itself.

items.title: 100% test report. No exceptions.

bento.title: The DNA of our systems.

items.title: Absolute freedom from corrosion

items.title: Acoustic insulation

items.title: Low pressure loss

visual.p1: Look at the weld seam of a K-Aqua prefabrication module under the microscope. You won't find a seam. You will see a single, homogeneous piece of material.

meta.title: High-rise construction infrastructure | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua high-rise construction – uncompromising security through German engineering for global megaprojects.

hero.desc: Megaprojects require more than just pipes. They require a pristine, maintenance-free circulatory system that can withstand extreme hydrostatic pressure and tectonic fluctuations. K-Aqua delivers uncompromising security for the world's most demanding buildings.

intro.title: A building is only as strong as its veins.
intro.lead: At an altitude of 500 meters, physics does not forgive design errors. A hairline crack in a riser means catastrophic damage running into millions of dollars. That's why at K-Aqua we leave nothing to chance.
intro.p1: High-rise buildings are vertical cities. They pulsate, they move, they breathe. With each floor, the hydrostatic pressure increases exponentially. Wind loads cause micro-vibrations throughout the structure. Temperature differences between the icy foundation and the sun-drenched top lead to enormous thermal linear expansion.
intro.p2: Traditional metallic piping systems reach their absolute physical limits here. Corrosion, pitting, incrustation and fatigue fractures on the weld seams are not a question of "if", but of "when". In high-rise construction, a leak is not just a technical problem - it is a financial risk that can jeopardize an entire project.
intro.p3: K-Aqua high-performance polymers (PP-R & PP-RCT) fundamentally change the rules of the game in high-rise infrastructure. They don't corrode. They don't calcify. And thanks to our homogeneous thermal welding technology, pipe and fitting fuse at the molecular level into a single, inseparable unit. The circulatory system becomes as strong as the material itself.

sticky.title: Mastering the physics of heights.
sticky.lead: Four fundamental challenges in high-rise construction - and how K-Aqua's German engineering mastery overcomes them.

items.title: Extreme hydrostatic pressure
items.desc: The water column grows with every meter of height. In megatalls, pressures of more than 30 bar arise. K-Aqua PP-RCT (Polypropylene Random Copolymer with modified Crystallinity and Temperature resistance) pipes offer up to 50% higher compressive strength at high temperatures compared to standard PP-R. They act as an indestructible backbone of the water supply, even in zones of maximum static load.

items.title: Thermal linear expansion & tension control
items.desc: Pumping hot water through a 300 meter long pipe creates immense linear expansion and shear forces. Our fiber composite technology reduces thermal expansion by up to 75%. This means fewer attachment points, no expansion loops and ultimate structural integrity packaged in a lightweight, easy-to-assemble system.

items.title: Molecular homogeneity (no leakage)
items.desc: Where O-rings or press fittings made of elastomers are installed, leaks inevitably occur due to aging. K-Aqua completely eliminates seals. Thermal heating element socket welding fuses the pipe and fitting at exactly 260°C. The resulting connection is as mechanically strong as the pipe itself. Zero leaks. Guaranteed for life.

items.title: Acoustic decoupling (sound insulation)
items.desc: In luxury penthouses and high-end offices, silence is the ultimate commodity. Flow noises and pressure shocks must be eliminated. The high material density and sound-absorbing properties of our PP-R polymers massively dampen structure-borne noise and flow noise and far exceed the strict requirements of DIN 4109 and VDI 4100.

bento.title: Architecture for eternity.
bento.lead: Precision manufactured according to the strictest German standards for 100% maintenance freedom. We define the global standard in the segment of piping systems for skyscrapers.

items.title: The PP-RCT revolution
items.desc: The next generation of polypropylene. Modified crystalline structure for unprecedented pressure and temperature resistance with reduced wall thickness. Maximizes flow, minimizes weight – a crucial factor in the statics of large buildings.

items.title: DIN EN ISO 15874
items.desc: tested safety by independent German testing institutes such as SKZ and DVGW. Highest drinking water quality, no leaching.

items.title: Absolute corrosion resistance
items.desc: Insensitive to pH value fluctuations, aggressive water qualities, chlorination and electrochemical corrosion (pitting).

items.title: Complete prefabrication
items.desc: Time is the most expensive commodity on the construction site. We deliver prefabricated distribution arrays, meter bars and riser components directly 'just-in-time' with millimeter precision. Reduces installation time by up to 60% and eliminates sources of error on the construction site.

timeline.title: The project cycle
timeline.desc: From the first flow simulation to decades of maintenance-free operation. The K-Aqua engineering team accompanies your mega project from the idea to commissioning.

items.title: Engineering & BIM
items.text: Our engineers support the design of the risers, the calculation of the pressure zones and provide complete BIM data (Revit) for collision checking and TGA planning.

items.title: Precision extrusion
items.text: In our state-of-the-art facilities in Germany, pipes and fittings are manufactured under constant ultrasonic wall thickness control and the strictest laboratory monitoring. Every batch is 100% traceable.

items.title: Just-in-time logistics
items.text: Through our global sales network, we ensure that the material arrives at the construction site on time - whether in the desert of Dubai, in Singapore or in Frankfurt am Main.

items.title: Homogeneous fusion
items.text: Local installers are trained on site by our technicians. The thermal welded connections are made in a matter of seconds and are fully pressure-resistant immediately after they have cooled down.

items.title: Maintenance-free operation
items.text: After the final pressure test, our systems disappear into the shaft or concrete. You will never have to think about them again for the next 50+ years. An invisible, perfect network.

data.title: Fact-based superiority.
data.lead: General contractors don't believe marketing promises. They believe in tensile strength, creep curves, dynamic pressure resistance and FNCT (Full Notch Creep Tests).
data.p1: The service life of a plastic pipe under pressure and temperature is determined by the creep internal pressure strength (creep curves). The standard industry specifications assume an operating life of 50 years. Our internal laboratory tests and thermal-oxidative ageing simulations verify durability for a service life of over 100 years. The K-Aqua PP-RCT material significantly delays the onset of thermal-oxidative degradation, even in circulation pipes with permanently high temperatures.
data.p2: Metal pipes become rough over the years due to corrosion and incrustation. The pipe friction loss increases, the cross section narrows, and the energy required for the feed pumps explodes. K-Aqua pipes have an absolute surface roughness of k = 0.007 mm. This mirror-smooth surface remains absolutely constant throughout its entire service life. The result: minimal pressure loss, massive energy savings when operating the pump and absolute hygiene, as neither biofilm nor legionella can attach.
