items.title: Molecular homogeneity
items.p1: The K-AQUA PPR system is based on advanced polyfusion technology. Through precisely calibrated heating, the pipe and fitting fuse at the molecular level into an inseparable, coherent unit.
items.p2: This seamless synthesis eliminates any weak points that inevitably arise with mechanical connections or gluing methods. The result is an infrastructure of absolute integrity that confidently withstands hydraulic shocks and extreme pressure peaks.

items.title: Thermal endurance
items.p1: Thermische Fluktuationen sind der Hauptfeind konventioneller Rohrleitungssysteme. K-AQUA Polymere sind durch ein hochverdichtetes Kristallgitter strukturiert, das selbst bei permanenten Betriebstemperaturen von bis zu 95°C strukturelle Deformationen verhindert.
items.p2: Die spezifische Wärmekapazität des Materials reduziert zudem die Notwendigkeit extremer Isolierungen, was die Energieeffizienz des Gesamtsystems signifikant steigert.

items.title: Hydraulische Perfektion
items.p1: Ein absoluter Rauheitswert von lediglich 0,007 mm definiert die Innenoberfläche der K-AQUA Rohre. Diese mikroskopisch glatte Topografie verhindert jegliche Inkrustation, Mineralablagerungen oder Biofilmbildung.
items.p2: Strömungsverluste werden auf ein physikalisches Minimum reduziert, was den Energiebedarf der Pumpensysteme über Jahrzehnte hinweg drastisch senkt. Der konstante Innendurchmesser garantiert eine perpetuelle, unverminderte Durchflussrate.

items.title: Chemische Immunität
items.p1: Im Gegensatz zu metallischen Systemen ist das K-AQUA PPR-Netzwerk vollständig immun gegen Oxidation, Lochfraß und galvanische Korrosion. Die inerten Eigenschaften des Copolymers widerstehen einer extremen Bandbreite hochaggressiver Chemikalien und variierender pH-Werte.
items.p2: Selbst in hochkorrosiven industriellen Umgebungen oder bei der Beförderung aggressiver Fluide bleibt die molekulare Integrität der Leitung unangetastet.

meta.title: Data centre infrastructure | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua data centres – uncompromising security through German engineering for global megaprojects.

items.title: The thermal challenge of AI and HPC
items.desc: Modern high-performance computing (HPC) and artificial intelligence (AI) racks produce immense waste heat. Air cooling alone reaches its physical limits. The future belongs to liquid cooling – and therefore water as a critical heat transfer medium directly on the chip.

items.title: Corrosion is the enemy of availability
items.desc: Metallic piping systems are subject to pitting, rust and chemical decomposition during continuous operation. A micro-crack in a data centre can cause millions in damages due to server failures. K-Aqua eliminates this risk with 100% corrosion-free polypropylene random copolymer (PP-R).

items.title: Ultrasound welded molecular connections
items.desc: Where conventional pipes rely on error-prone seals or screw connections, K-Aqua systems merge on a molecular level. The result: A completely homogeneous, absolutely leak-free pipeline network. Zero tolerance for leaks.

items.title: Sustainability & PUE optimisation
items.desc: A low PUE value (Power Usage Effectiveness) is the holy grail of data centre operators. K-Aqua pipes have excellent thermodynamic properties. Lower pipe friction losses and optimal thermal insulation massively minimise energy losses during cooling water circulation.

items.title: Flow simulation & design
items.text: Our engineers analyse the cooling requirements of the data centre. We calculate volume flows, eliminate bottlenecks and dimension the pipe network for maximum hydrodynamic efficiency.

items.title: Precision prefabrication
items.text: In the main factory in Germany, complex distribution spools are prefabricated to measure. Accurate to the centimetre, fully automated and quality assured under laboratory conditions.

items.title: Just-in-time logistics
items.text: Megaprojects do not forgive delivery delays. We coordinate global logistics directly on the construction site, synchronised with the strict rhythm of the general contractors.

items.title: Homogeneous welding
items.text: Local installation teams are tested by K-Aqua master welders. The molecular welding on the construction site guarantees a 100% leak-free, homogeneous pipe structure with no weak points.

items.title: Pressure testing & certification
items.text: Before handover, a relentless hydraulic pressure and load test is carried out. Only when the system passes these tests do we issue approval and assume the full system guarantee.

timeline.title: The engineering process
timeline.desc: From the hydrodynamic sketch to the final acceptance: How we implement global hyperscale infrastructures without compromises and in record time.

hero.desc: When cooling systems are at the heart of global data centres, material failure is not an option. Discover the safest, most efficient and scalable PP-R piping solution for mission-critical refrigeration and air conditioning.

section1.title: Why classic pipes fail.
section1.lead: The requirements of modern hyperscalers and AI clusters exceed the physical limits of traditional metal systems.

section2.title: Materials Science for the 21st Century.
section2.lead: Every atomic detail of our system has been optimised for absolute reliability and durability.

items.title: Chemical neutrality & purity
items.desc: Closed cooling circuits require conditioning agents. K-Aqua is completely inert towards aggressive additives and completely prevents algae and biofilm formation. No chemical decomposition, no particles in the cooling water.

items.title: Pressure resilience in high-rise buildings
items.desc: Designed for constant maximum loads under extreme PN10 / PN20 pressure conditions in vertical high-rise data centres.

items.title: German prefabrication
items.desc: We pre-weld complex distribution blocks in our main factory in Germany. Plug-and-play delivery for drastically reduced construction times.

items.title: Earthquake-proof (Seismic Resistance)
items.desc: In contrast to rigid metal systems, our PP-R system has a defined intrinsic elasticity. Shock waves and massive vibrations from emergency generators or strong seismic activity are absorbed instead of causing destructive fractures.

hero.desc: Wir machen keine Kompromisse. Wir definieren den globalen Standard für PP-R Rohrleitungssysteme. Willkommen im Epizentrum deutscher Ingenieurskunst.

intro.desc: Seit über 30 Jahren fertigen wir Rohrleitungssysteme, die für die Ewigkeit gebaut sind. Kein Raum für Fehler. Kein Platz für Mittelmaß. Nur reine, unerbittliche Präzision, die sich in jedem einzelnen Fitting manifestiert.

material.p1: PP-R Typ 3 ist nicht einfach ein Kunststoff. Es ist ein hochkomplexes, thermoplastisches Material, das wir auf molekularer Ebene beherrschen.
material.p2: Durch die strategische Anordnung von Ethylen-Monomeren in der Propylen-Kette erreichen wir eine unerreichte Schlagzähigkeit – selbst bei Minustemperaturen. Unsere Granulate stammen ausschließlich von der globalen Elite der Rohstoffproduzenten. Wir analysieren jede Charge mittels Differential Scanning Calorimetry (DSC) und Melt Flow Rate (MFR) Tests. Was unsere Spezifikationen um auch nur ein Promille verfehlt, wird erbarmungslos eliminiert.

items.title: Extreme Molmasse
items.desc: Garantiert maximale Zeitstandfestigkeit und absoluten Widerstand gegen Spannungsrisskorrosion unter extremen Drücken.

items.title: Kristalline Optimierung
items.desc: Die perfekte thermodynamische Balance. Höchste Flexibilität für radikale Verlegebedingungen bei simultaner axialer Steifigkeit.

timeline.title: Die Evolution der Perfektion
timeline.desc: Ein unaufhaltsamer Aufstieg zur globalen Marktmacht. Jede Dekade ein Meilenstein technologischer Überlegenheit.

items.title: Der Ursprung der Toleranzlosigkeit
items.text: Wo andere Kompromisse machten, zogen wir eine rote Linie. Die Gründung von K-Aqua basierte auf einem einzigen, unerschütterlichen Prinzip: Makellose Rohrleitungssysteme. Unsere ersten Extruder liefen mit einer Präzision, die den Markt schockierte.

items.title: Die Polypropylen-Revolution
items.text: Wir weigerten uns, den Status quo zu akzeptieren. Mit der Einführung unserer proprietären PP-R Mischung definierten wir thermische Stabilität neu. Während Konkurrenzprodukte unter Druck kollabierten, blieben unsere Systeme stoisch intakt. Ein Triumph der Polymerchemie.

items.title: Die architektonische Symbiose
items.text: Von den Skylines in Dubai bis zu den Industrieanlagen im Ruhrgebiet – K-Aqua wurde zum Synonym für unzerstörbare Infrastruktur. Unsere PP-RCT Faserverbundrohre revolutionierten den Hochbau. Weniger Ausdehnung, mehr Durchfluss, absolute Dominanz.

items.title: Die Molekulare Diktatur
items.text: Heute kontrollieren wir jeden Aspekt der Produktion. Von der Auswahl der Rohgranulate bis zur Endinspektion unterliegen unsere Systeme einem diktatorischen Qualitätsregime. Das Ergebnis? Eine garantierte Lebensdauer, die Generationen überdauert.

sticky.title: The Four Pillars of Power.
sticky.lead: Technology bordering on magic. We haven't just overcome the limitations of conventional piping systems, we've pulverized them.

items.title: Absolutism in Quality
items.desc: Every millimeter of our PP-R and PP-RCT systems undergoes brutal stress tests. A 50-year lifespan is not a promise, but a mathematical certainty. We tolerate zero deviations. What leaves our halls is perfection in polymer form.

items.title: Thermal Invulnerability
items.desc: Our fibre composite pipes (K-Aqua Fibre) neutralize thermal linear expansion almost completely. Whether freezing -20°C or boiling +95°C, our systems remain absolutely dimensionally stable. An engineering masterpiece that seems to defy the laws of physics.

items.title: Chemical Resistance
items.desc: Corrosion does not exist in our vocabulary. Our polymers are immune to the most aggressive media, incrustation, and biological decomposition. While metals rust and decay in the ground, K-Aqua remains untouched – stoic, monolithic, indestructible.

items.title: Molecular Fusion
items.desc: Through our homogeneous welding process, pipe and fitting fuse at the molecular level into an inseparable unit. No seals that can fatigue. No mechanical weak points. A monolithic structure that lasts forever.

bento.title: Infrastructure on Steroids.
bento.lead: We don't just manufacture pipes. We create the arteries of modern civilization. K-Aqua is the backbone of industrial and architectural megaprojects worldwide.

items.title: Brutal Extrusion
items.desc: High-performance systems working under brutal pressure. The result is unmatched wall thickness consistency down to the micrometer level.

items.title: Tested Superiority
items.desc: ISO 9001, 14001, 50001. We don't just exceed standards, we dictate them. International accreditation as the absolute standard.

items.title: Hygiene Dictate
items.desc: Food-safe, toxicologically harmless, and absolutely germ-resistant. Drinking water remains untouched and pure in K-Aqua systems. No exceptions.

items.title: Resource Efficiency

meta.title: Training | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua Training – Uncompromising safety through German Engineering for global megaprojects.

hero.desc: The K-Aqua training programme is no ordinary further education. It is the initiation into the uncompromising world of German pipe construction. For engineers and technicians responsible for megaprojects where material failure is not an option, but an absolute catastrophe. We teach in micrometres, we think in decades.

manifesto.p1: It is the result of relentless methodology and cold, industrial discipline. When thousands of cubic metres of water are pumped under enormous pressure through the lifelines of a 100-storey skyscraper, there is no room for approximations or interpretations.
manifesto.p2: The K-Aqua training programme was developed to bridge the gap between theoretical knowledge and flawless, mechanical perfection. Anyone trained in our academy no longer acts as a mere tradesperson – they become the executive organ of a perfect, deterministic system.

bento.title: Knowledge as an absolute weapon.
bento.lead: Our technical training modules are not designed to make things easy for you. They are designed to mercilessly eradicate errors.

items.title: Homogeneous Material Fusion
items.desc: Beyond bonding or unstable mechanical seals. We train the exact calibration of temperature, pressure and time in order to fuse pipes and fittings into an inseparable, monolithic structure at a molecular level.

items.title: Destructive Analytics
items.desc: To understand the limits, one must exceed them. Practical modules in our high-pressure test rigs with bursting pressures far beyond 100 bar. We analyse failure to eliminate it in practice.

items.title: Thermal Linear Expansion
items.desc: Cold-blooded compensation of temperature fluctuations in large-scale projects through precisely calculated expansion loops and fixed-point systems.

items.title: Aggressive Media & pH Stability
items.desc: In-depth analysis of resistance to highly concentrated industrial chemicals. The academy imparts profound knowledge on material fatigue under continuous chemical stress and radical pH shifts.

curriculum.title: Academic uncompromisingness.
curriculum.lead: Four modules. One doctrine. Every segment of our curriculum is geared towards identifying weaknesses in execution and systemically annihilating them.

items.title: Module Alpha: Fluid Mechanics & Kinetics
items.desc: The mathematics of water. We break down complex cavitation effects and water hammer scenarios into calculable variables. You learn not merely to dampen hydrodynamic shock symptoms, but to systemically eliminate them. For pipe networks that operate in complete, silent perfection.

items.title: Module Beta: Parametric Pipe Design
items.desc: The design of piping systems as an algorithmic discipline. The training includes the use of state-of-the-art CAD/BIM tools for clash detection and to optimise material utilisation. No estimation. Pure, cold calculation.

items.title: Module Gamma: Hygiene Architecture & Microbiology
items.desc: Legionella prevention at a structural level. How to avoid dead legs, obliterate stagnation zones and control water temperature stratifications in complex ring main systems. The system dictates the purity – we leave nothing to chance.

items.title: Module Delta: The Final K-Aqua Audit
items.desc: Certification is not a right; it is a privilege. The examination demands the construction and theoretical defence of a self-sufficient water supply system under simulated extreme conditions (e.g. seismic activity, 50°C external temperature). Only those who prove absolute faultlessness carry the K-Aqua certificate.

timeline.title: The Certification Path.
timeline.desc: The transformation from installer to tested K-Aqua Master Engineer follows a strict, relentless rhythm. Only those who walk this path to the very end receive authorisation for our high-performance systems.

items.title: Material Physics & Onboarding
items.text: Grasping the physical limits. An in-depth introduction to the molecular PP-R/PP-RCT material specifications. This is where the foundation of industrial toughness is cast.

items.title: Laboratory & Stress Tests
items.text: Hands-on destruction. Experiencing the bursting limit in the test rig and studying microscopic crack formations. Only those who know the weakness can construct absolute strength.

items.title: Fusion Doctrine
items.text: The perfect welding protocol. Mechanical training of thermodynamic movements until they become an infallible, muscular automatism. Every motion is calibrated.

items.title: System Architecture
items.text: Scaling from a simple pipe segment to the infrastructure of a skyscraper. We execute pressure loss tables, flow velocities and flow dividers with ironclad logic.

items.title: The Master Examination
items.text: A 48-hour audit under the merciless supervision of German chief engineers. No tolerance for miscalculations. One mistake means immediate expulsion.

spec.title: The global benchmark for safety.
spec.desc: Our certification is not merely a piece of paper. It is a promise cast in titanium to builders and investors worldwide. Where the K-Aqua certificate is present, the installation has been carried out according to the strictest German engineering standards.

items.title: International Validity
items.text: Recognised by the world's leading building and supervisory authorities.

items.title: Audit transparency
items.text: Seamless, digital documentation of every welding process.

items.title: Lifelong authority
items.text: Once acquired, it marks the engineer as part of an elite tier.

cta.desc: Submit yourself to the standard of German engineering. Send us your profile or request the specifications for internal company audits.

meta.title: Certificates & Standards | K-Aqua
meta.desc: DVGW, SKZ, ISO and more. Discover the uncompromising safety and German engineering quality of the K-Aqua piping systems.

hero.desc: This module delivers uncompromising security for the most demanding projects worldwide. Crafted to the strictest industry standards to last for generations. Because material failure is never an option.

manifesto.title2: The process behind it is made of steel.
manifesto.p1: Many manufacturers see standards as the ultimate goal. We see it as the absolute lower limit. Our internal tolerances are many times stricter than what DVGW, ISO or SKZ require. When a K-Aqua pipe leaves our factory, it has been analysed at the molecular level, tortured with extreme pressures and thermally pushed to the absolute limit.

bento.title: The DNA of a perfect pipe system.
bento.lead: When international general contractors plan billion-dollar projects, they don't trust marketing promises. They demand hard, physically measurable facts.

items.title: Extreme pressure resistance
items.desc: tested for continuous loads up to PN20/PN25. Our burst pressure tests prove reserves that go far beyond the standards. Burst pipes are a thing of the past.

items.title: Thermal sovereignty
items.desc: Permanently resistant from -20°C to +95°C. No material fatigue, no structural weakening – even in the event of extreme thermal shocks.

items.title: Absolute hygiene
items.desc: No corrosion. No incrustation. Food-safe, toxicologically harmless and resistant to legionella growth.

items.title: Fire protection (B1/B2)
items.desc: Classified according to DIN 4102. Flame retardant and minimal smoke development for maximum safety in critical building infrastructures.

items.title: Life cycle guarantee
items.desc: A defined service life of 50 years according to the strictest ISO standard. In architectural reality, however, they are built to last entire generations.

certifications.title: The toughest examiners in the world.
certifications.lead: Only those who pass the most critical external audits are allowed to bear the 'German Engineering' label. Here are the institutions that validate our quality.

items.title: DVGW – The highest authority
items.p1: The German Gas and Water Association (DVGW) sets the world's strictest standards for drinking water hygiene and material resistance.
items.p2: Our DVGW certification guarantees that K-Aqua pipe systems neither release toxic substances nor promote microbiological growth under extreme conditions. Each batch undergoes long-term hydrostatic tests (creep internal pressure test) at 95°C.

items.title: SKZ – Independent monitoring
items.p1: The South German Plastics Centre (SKZ) acts as our incorruptible auditor. External third-party monitoring ensures what our internal laboratories already specify.
items.p2: Notched impact strength, tensile strength and thermal behaviour are tested using DSC analysis (Dynamic Scanning Calorimetry). The SKZ mark is proof of mechanical perfection, far beyond DIN EN ISO 15874.

items.title: KTW-BWGL – Absolute purity
items.p1: The assessment basis for plastics and other organic materials in contact with drinking water (Federal Environment Agency).
items.p2: We only use high-purity polypropylene (PP-R / PP-RCT) without harmful additives or heavy metals. The result? Spring water quality straight from the tap. No smell or taste impairment.

items.title: ISO 9001 & 14001 – Systematic Excellence
items.p1: Quality is not a coincidence, but an absolutely reproducible process. Our ISO 9001 certification proves seamless quality management from the receipt of raw materials to the worldwide delivery of goods.
items.p2: With ISO 14001 we prove that industrial excellence and ecological responsibility go hand in hand. Minimised energy consumption, efficient use of resources and the 100% recyclability of our PP products.

lab.desc: Before a K-Aqua system leaves the factory, it must go through our in-house test centre. A highly upgraded facility where we expose materials to conditions they will never experience in reality.

items.title: MFR (Melt Flow Rate)
items.desc: Control melt flow rate to ensure accurate viscosity during extrusion and subsequent welding on site.

items.title: OIT (Oxidation Induction Time)
items.desc: Thermal analysis to determine ageing resistance. Proof that our stabilisers protect plastic from degradation for decades.

items.title: Creep internal pressure test
items.desc: Pipe samples are stored in special water baths at 95°C under extreme pressure – for thousands of hours. Without crack. Without breakage.

timeline.title: Decades of innovation.
timeline.desc: Our quality standards were not created overnight. They are the result of decades of engineering and continuous process optimisation.

items.title: The birth of the standard
items.text: As pioneers of plastic pipe extrusion, we implemented internal testing procedures at an early stage that went far beyond the industry requirements of the time. The foundation for an uncompromising quality culture.

items.title: ISO 9001 integration
items.text: The complete certification of our quality management systems according to ISO 9001. Every move, every raw material batch, every machine setting is now systematically documented and made completely traceable.

items.title: DVGW & SKZ certification
items.text: Inclusion in the exclusive circle of DVGW and SKZ tested manufacturers. The official seal for absolute hygiene, extreme pressure resistance and unsurpassed durability under the toughest conditions in drinking water use.

items.title: Global standards (WRAS, KTW)
items.text: Expansion of certifications for international markets. Compliance with the strict KTW guidelines (UBA) and the British WRAS requirements. K-Aqua is becoming the global standard for international megaprojects.

items.title: Next-Gen Quality Analytics
items.text: Introduction of highly automated OIT (Oxidation Induction Time) and MFR (Melt Flow Rate) tests in our own precision laboratory. AI-supported error analysis during extrusion for a 100% zero-defect rate.

meta.title: Technical Glossary | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua Glossary – Uncompromising security through German engineering for global megaprojects.

hero.desc: Welcome to the lexical core of piping technology. Here we decode the principles of German engineering. No marketing. Just physical facts, materials science and industrial authority.

manifesto.title: The Architecture of Infallibility.
manifesto.lead: A piping system is the cardiovascular system of any megaproject. A failure means an infrastructural heart attack. That's why we're not talking about pipes, but about vital industrial arteries. Each term in this glossary represents a pillar of our zero-defect philosophy.

scroll.title: The K-Aqua process.
scroll.lead: From the molecular granulate level to the final pressure test. Understand the physical principles that make our systems indestructible.

items.title: Extrusion dynamics under high pressure
items.desc: Thermoplastic forming in our factories is subject to precise temperature control to within 0.1°C. This crystalline perfection guarantees a flawless, homogeneous molecular structure that absolutely excludes microscopic cracking, even under extreme pressure and temperature fluctuations. When the material leaves our extruder, it is no longer a simple plastic - it is an industrial monolith.

items.title: Hydrostatic load tests
items.desc: In our test laboratories, every pipe is subjected to a hydrostatic simulation that exceeds real conditions many times over. We apply internal pressures that go beyond any normative requirement (up to 100 bar, depending on the SDR class). This ensures the integrity of the welds and the molecular elasticity of the PP-R material over a predicted service life of more than 50 years in critical infrastructure.

items.title: Polyfusion welding technology
items.desc: Connections are the weak point in traditional systems. K-Aqua eliminates this risk through polyfusion. At the molecular level, pipe and fitting merge into an inseparable, continuous unit. There are no threads to corrode, no seals to fail. The result is a piping system that behaves as if it were cast from a single piece.

items.title: Cavitation resistance & fluid mechanics
items.desc: Thanks to an ultra-smooth inner wall (roughness < 0.007 mm), K-Aqua pipes minimize flow resistance to zero. This prevents the formation of biofilms and eliminates micro-cavitation effects in high-velocity flows. Pressure losses in the system are drastically reduced, maximizing the energy efficiency of the connected pump systems on an industrial scale.

bento.title: Technical parameters.
bento.lead: The most important vocabulary of industrial piping technology, distilled to its essence.

items.title: PP-R (Polypropylene Random Copolymer)
items.desc: The molecular basis. A highly crystalline thermoplastic polymer that offers exceptional resistance to high temperatures and pressures. It is the DNA of our longevity.

items.title: Linear thermal expansion
items.desc: The change in length of the material when the temperature changes. Our fiber-reinforced (fiber) pipes reduce this value to an absolute minimum (α = 0.035 mm/mK), which enormously increases the structural stability in shafts.

items.title: creep strength
items.desc: The ability of the system to withstand constant internal pressure at specific temperatures for decades without deforming or bursting. K-Aqua pipes are calibrated to last 50+ years.

items.title: Pressure loss coefficient
items.desc: A mathematical value that describes the energy loss of the flow due to friction on the inner wall of the pipe. This value is marginalized in K-Aqua systems due to nano-smooth surfaces.

items.title: SDR (Standard Dimension Ratio)
items.desc: The relationship between the outside diameter (d) and the wall thickness (s). An SDR 6 tube can withstand massively higher pressures than an SDR 11 tube. The correct choice is crucial for system design.
items.label: 50+ YRS

timeline.title: Regulatory toughness.
timeline.desc: For us, standards are not regulations, but rather the starting point of our engineering skills. A chronology of the certifications and standards that our systems not only meet, but dominate.

items.title: Normative basis
items.text: The basis of German piping standards. We do not view these standards as a goal, but as an absolute minimum. Our internal tolerances are up to 30% stricter than required by DIN.

items.title: Global certification
items.text: The international seal of quality for plastic piping systems for hot and cold water installations. Proof of the uncompromising global applicability of our systems.

items.title: Standard Dimension Ratios
items.text: A precise ratio of outside diameter to wall thickness. Our engineers calibrate each batch to guarantee maximum pressure resistance at optimal flow rate.

items.title: Hygiene & material testing
items.text: Certificates that certify the absolute authenticity of food and drinking water. No heavy metals, no leaching. Pure, uncontaminated fluid dynamics for the highest hygienic demands.

conclusion.title: Resistance to decomposition in extreme cases.
conclusion.p1: In industrial applications, it is not the normal operation that determines the quality of a piping system, but rather the stability in the limit areas. Chemical corrosion, cavitation from pressure shocks and thermal shock are the natural enemies of conventional installations.
conclusion.p2: The K-Aqua Matrix isolates the fluid medium from the environment through an inert barrier layer. There is no ion exchange. Metallic systems degrade from the moment water flows through them. They sacrifice themselves in order to function. Our PP-R system remains flawless inside even after decades.
conclusion.p3: The term environmental stress cracking resistance (ESCR) is of central importance in polymer chemistry. We modify the molecular weight of our copolymer so that it absorbs peak loads rather than breaking under them. The result is a system that absorbs shocks, vibrations and settlement of the building structure.
conclusion.p4: Anyone who understands the terminology of piping technology also understands why compromises can mean ruin. German Engineering is not an empty promise, but the sum of precise, physical parameters that we manifest in every single centimeter of our production.

faq.q: Which media is the system designed for?
faq.a: For drinking water — hot and cold — with high temperature and pressure resistance over decades. Thanks to PP’s resistance to solvents, alkalis and acids, industrial applications are possible too; we verify those with you project by project.

faq.q: What do the five SDR classes stand for?
faq.a: SDR is the ratio of outer diameter to wall thickness (d/s). Smaller SDR = thicker wall = higher nominal pressure: SDR 6 corresponds to PN 20, SDR 17 to PN 6. You pick exactly the reserve each application needs — without over-dimensioning.

faq.q: When monolayer, when K-Fibre?
faq.a: Monolayer is the economical standard for most applications. The glass-fibre composite cuts thermal expansion to roughly a quarter, allows wider clamp spacing and stays dimensionally stable in large bores and hot water — the choice for risers, circulation and d ≥ 160.

faq.q: How are the pipes joined?
faq.a: By fusion welding — socket welding by hand (up to d63) or machine, electrofusion via heating-coil fittings, and butt fusion for large bores up to d630. Matching devices and tools are part of the programme; the Academy shows all four methods on video.

faq.q: Is the system compliant for drinking water?
faq.a: The system is engineered for drinking water; polypropylene is neutral in taste and odour. Conformity evidence for drinking-water contact (DVGW/KTW) is available in the Trust Centre as part of the RFP document package.

faq.q: What service life underlies the design?
faq.a: The pressure classes are based on the long-term regression curves of DIN 8077/8078 with a design horizon of 50 years of operation — safety factor included. The two programme anchors: SDR 6 at 20 bar/20 °C and PP-RCT SDR 7.4 at 10 bar/70 °C.

academyx.paramLead: Heating, changeover and cooling times for socket welding to DVS 2207-11 (heating element 250–270 °C) — the basis demonstrated in the videos.
academyx.paramNote: Reference values to DVS 2207-11 for PP at 250–270 °C element temperature. The welding-device manufacturer’s specifications and the processing instructions remain binding — in doubt: watch the video, check the device parameters.
academyx.stepLead: Each method has its dimension range — and five steps that decide the quality of the joint.

procs.t: Socket welding by hand — up to d63

steps.d: Cut the pipe square, deburr and chamfer cleanly — use the pipe cutters from the K-Aqua tool programme.
Mark the depth per table (e.g. 14 mm at d20) on the pipe — it defines the fusion zone.
Pipe into the heating socket, fitting onto the spigot — push on simultaneously and hold the heating time exactly.
Join axially within the changeover time. Never rotate: twisting destroys the plasticised structure.
Hold the joint for a few seconds, then respect the cooling time before applying any mechanical load.

procs.t: Socket welding by machine — medium dimensions

steps.d: Cutting, deburring, marking the depth — the ground rules stay identical.
The machine holds both parts coaxially — offset and tilt errors are mechanically excluded.
Heating socket and spigot per DVS reference values; the machine holds position and time reproducibly.
The feed joins axially and evenly — at d75 to d125 the key to consistent quality.
Unclamp and continue working only after the cooling time has elapsed.
Scrape and clean the pipe surface in the fusion zone — oxide skin and dirt prevent fusion.
Mark the depth on the pipe, push the pipe into the fitting up to the stop.
Use holding clamps — the fitting must not be under bending stress during welding.
The unit energises the heating coils embedded in the fitting — parameters come from the fitting, not from gut feeling.
Move or load only after the stated cooling time — check the indicators on the fitting.

procs.t: Butt fusion — large bores up to d630

steps.d: Plane both pipe ends in the machine until continuous shavings appear — plane-parallel faces are mandatory.
Offset no more than 10 % of the wall thickness — at d630 every millimetre counts.
Equalise under pressure until the bead forms, then heat-soak without pressure — times per DVS 2207-11.
Remove the element swiftly and bring the ends together under the defined joining pressure.
Joining pressure stays on until the cooling time ends — producing the homogeneous, permanently tight run.

academyx.errTitle: The six costliest mistakes — and their prevention.
errRows: The bead grows inwards and narrows the cross-section
Stop the heating time by the table — not by feel
The plasticised structure is destroyed, the joint leaks
Join axially only, use the depth mark as a control
Material piles up, the fusion zone becomes uneven
Deburr every cut — the tool is part of the system
Residues burn and embed themselves in the seam
Wipe the heating surfaces with a lint-free cloth before every weld
The seam deforms before it solidifies
Respect cooling times — 8 minutes at d110
Too short: small fusion area · too deep: narrowed bore
Always mark the depth, never estimate
gloss: SDR
Standard Dimension Ratio = outer diameter divided by wall thickness (d/s). Smaller SDR = thicker wall = higher nominal pressure.
PN
Nominal pressure in bar at 20 °C across the design horizon — SDR 6 corresponds to PN 20, SDR 17 to PN 6.
d / di / s
Outer diameter / inner diameter / wall thickness in millimetres — di = d − 2s.
PP-R
Polypropylene random copolymer — the proven standard material for drinking-water installations.
PP-RCT
PP-R with modified crystalline structure ("crystallinity temperature") — more temperature and pressure reserve at the same wall.
K-Fibre / GF
Glass-fibre reinforced multilayer construction — cuts thermal expansion to roughly a quarter.
Socket welding
Pipe and fitting are plasticised over a heating socket and spigot and pushed together.
Electrofusion
Heating coils embedded in the fitting generate the fusion heat — parameter-controlled.
Butt fusion
Plane-parallel pipe ends are heated at an element and joined under pressure — standard up to d630.
The rulebook for welding polypropylene — source of the reference values on this page.

posts.teaser: KWT GmbH’s ISO management system now covers quality, environment and energy — DAkkS-accredited.
body: Since October 2025, KWT GmbH’s management system is triple tested: ISO 9001:2015 for quality, ISO 14001:2015 for environment and ISO 50001:2018 for energy. The certificates are issued by a DAkkS-accredited certification body and are valid until October 2028.

For procurement and compliance this means documented, auditable processes from extruder to dispatch. The lived GENAU management system already met the requirements of DIN EN ISO 14001 and 50001 — certification makes it externally robust.
Both certificate versions (DE/EN) are available for download; bundle the full audit package in the Trust Centre.

posts.t: Continuously marked: traceability from the extruder
posts.teaser: Every K-Aqua pipe carries continuous marking applied directly in the extrusion process.
body: At up to 14,000 metres of pipe per day and line, traceability is not optional: every pipe is continuously marked during extrusion — with the information specifiers and inspectors need on site.

The marking links the physical product to its batch and the QA test records. What is printed on the pipe can be traced back to the test lab — one building block of the QA manual that auditors can request in the Trust Centre.

posts.teaser: From flare gas to drinking-water pipe: the short material history of polypropylene.
body: Polypropylene is made from gases that used to be flared off uselessly — using them as a material cuts air pollution at the source. As an engineering plastic, PP is unusually resistant to solvents, alkalis and acids and forms complex geometries in injection moulding.

Inside the pipe, the bore is what counts: at 0.007 mm roughness, pressure loss stays minimal and biofilm and incrustation find little hold. Add thermal conductivity of 0.24 W/(m·K) — hot water stays hot without the line working against itself.
PP-RCT pushes the limits further: the modified crystalline structure brings more temperature and pressure reserve — SDR 7.4 sustains 70 °C at 10 bar continuously.

posts.t: Brass meets polypropylene: transitions into existing stock
posts.teaser: Renovation almost always means a system change — transition pieces with brass threads make it clean.
body: Hardly any project starts on a greenfield: existing copper or galvanised-steel lines must be connected. Transition pieces with embedded brass female or male threads do the job — the thread side connects the metal stock, the PP side is fusion-welded.

This enables section-by-section renovation: corroded runs are replaced, working ones remain — and the corrosion problem does not migrate into the new system. Unions keep the connection detachable where needed, e.g. at valves and water meters.

finderx.helpLead: Five terms are enough to understand every row of the range.
help: Outer diameter in millimetres — the key size of every dimension from d20 to d630.
Standard Dimension Ratio = d/s. Smaller SDR means thicker wall and higher nominal pressure.
Wall thickness in millimetres — follows from d and SDR: s = d/SDR.
Inner diameter = d − 2s. Decisive for flow rate and pressure loss.
Permissible continuous operating pressure in bar at 20 °C across the design horizon — SDR 6 = PN 20 down to SDR 17 = PN 6.

flow.d: Narrow down type, SDR and maximum dimension — or type "d110" straight into the search.

co2x.methLead: Transparency instead of a black box — four building blocks behind every result.

meth.d: Pipe mass follows from ring cross-section × length × density (0.905 g/cm³) — the same geometry as in the dimension tables.
The emission factors per material are demonstration values for the system comparison. Binding factors come from ecoinvent or product-specific Type III EPDs to EN 15804.
Converted at roughly 25 kg of CO₂ bound per tree per year and 0.15 kg CO₂e per car kilometre — orders of magnitude everyone in the project meeting understands.
For audits and certification, the document counts: EPD data sheets and scope-3 data are available in the Trust Centre or on request.

sections.title: 5. Contact and inquiry forms

When you use one of our inquiry forms, we process the data provided there: phone number, email address, the topic you selected, and the page the inquiry was sent from. This data is transmitted by email to info@k-aqua.de and — where a CRM system is connected — stored there to handle your inquiry.

For applications via the careers form, the application data you provide (name, contact details, CV or details of experience and education) is transmitted by email to our HR department.

The sole purpose of processing is handling your inquiry or application. The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (pre-contractual measures) or Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. The data is deleted once it is no longer required for this purpose and no statutory retention obligations apply.

To protect against automated spam submissions we use an invisible technical check (honeypot field and time threshold) — no third-party captcha services.

sections.title: 6. Cookies and consent
sections.content:
This website uses technically necessary cookies and similar storage technologies, for example to store your language and display preferences and your cookie decision. These are required to operate the website (legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR and § 25(2) German TDDDG).

Via the cookie banner you can additionally consent to the "Analytics" and "Marketing" categories. We currently use no analytics or marketing services; should such services be integrated in the future, they will only be loaded after your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR, § 25(1) TDDDG). You can withdraw any consent at any time with effect for the future via the cookie settings.

sections.title: 7. Your rights
sections.content:
Within the scope of applicable law, you have the right at any time to:

- Access to your stored personal data (Art. 15 GDPR)
- Rectification of inaccurate data (Art. 16 GDPR)
- Erasure (Art. 17 GDPR)
- Restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
- Data portability (Art. 20 GDPR)
- Objection to processing based on legitimate interests (Art. 21 GDPR)

To exercise these rights, contact the controller named above or our data protection officer. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority — in our case the Hessian Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information (HBDI), Wiesbaden, Germany.

pipes.title: Superior Durability & Hygiene
pipes.desc: Our high-performance pipe systems made of PP-R and PP-RCT offer over 50 years of maintenance-free lifespan. The extremely smooth inner surface prevents incrustation, corrosion, and biofilm formation – for maximum drinking water hygiene according to the highest global standards.

pipes.title: Thermal Efficiency & Insulation
pipes.desc: Due to the naturally low thermal conductivity of the material, our pipes drastically minimise heat loss. Compared to metallic pipes, you save significant energy costs and reduce your project's CO2 footprint.

fittings.title: Homogeneous Welded Joint
fittings.desc: K-Aqua fittings fuse into an inseparable, 100% leak-free unit with the pipe through socket fusion welding. No O-rings, no mechanical weak points.

fittings.title: High-Quality Transitions
fittings.desc: Our transition fittings use deeply embedded, dezincification-resistant brass threaded inserts (CW617N). This guarantees maximum torsional strength and secure connections to metallic components.

valves.title: Precise Control
valves.desc: K-Aqua valves offer excellent flow control and complete shut-off without pressure loss. Maintenance-free, smooth operation, and corrosion-resistant.

valves.title: Full Bore & Efficiency
valves.desc: The full-bore design ensures no flow resistance when the valve is fully open – ideal for pumping systems and risers.

fallback.title: System Compatibility
fallback.desc: Perfectly matched to the entire K-Aqua product range. Guarantees smooth installation and maximum system security.

fallback.title: tested Quality
fallback.desc: Manufactured under strictest quality controls (ISO 9001/14001). Tested worldwide and approved for demanding projects.

extendedProductText.p1: K-Aqua PP-R and PP-RCT piping systems are manufactured in Germany according to the highest industrial standards. Thanks to the unique material properties of polypropylene random copolymer, our pipes offer exceptional resistance against pressure, heat, and chemical stress.
extendedProductText.p2: Whether for drinking water installations, industrial cooling circuits, or complex HVAC networks — the homogeneous socket fusion guarantees a 100% leak-free connection. Without sealing rings, without weak points.
extendedProductText.p3: Engineers and planners worldwide trust our certified quality (DVGW, SKZ). Minimise pressure losses, reduce installation times, and rely on a system lifespan of over 50 years.

extendedMarketText.p1: As an international manufacturer, K-Aqua guarantees not only premium product quality but also a highly efficient logistics chain. We deliver our PP-R systems directly to major global construction sites — punctual, reliable, and perfectly tailored to local regulatory requirements.
extendedMarketText.p2: Our experienced sales engineering team provides support right from the planning phase, ensuring that all pressure tests and isometric calculations are flawless.
extendedMarketText.p3: From high-rise buildings in the Middle East to industrial plants in Europe — K-Aqua is the foundation for modern and sustainable water infrastructures.

support.title: Technical Support
support.metaDesc: K-Aqua Technical Support – Uncompromising safety through German Engineering for global megaprojects.

seoText.p1: K-Aqua's technical support is the backbone of our global infrastructure projects. We know that every second counts when installing industrial piping systems and PP-R high-performance lines. Our expert team for fluid technology and polymer systems assists international general contractors, architects, and civil engineers every step of the way.
seoText.p2: From initial planning and isometric calculations to pressure loss layout and on-site welding process monitoring – we guarantee flawless implementation. Our Polypropylene Random Copolymer (PP-R) systems require the highest level of craftsmanship. That is why our Academy provides continuous training, while our support intervenes during complex thermal expansion challenges or specific fluid pressure requirements.
seoText.p3: By utilizing state-of-the-art diagnostic tools and predictive maintenance algorithms, we reduce downtime to an absolute minimum. Whether it involves cold water systems in desert regions, high-purity industrial plants, or heating networks in arctic zones – the K-Aqua support infrastructure ensures smooth operation and the uncompromising longevity of your investment.

landwirtschaft.metaDesc: K-Aqua Agriculture – High-performance infrastructure for global agricultural projects. Uncompromising safety through German Engineering.
landwirtschaft.heroDesc: Global food security tolerates no compromises in irrigation. K-Aqua delivers high-performance systems for the world's largest agricultural projects. Manufactured to the strictest industry standards. Where a pipe burst costs millions, K-Aqua is the only logical choice.
landwirtschaft.section1Lead: When massive irrigation systems are built in the middle of the Sahara or the Australian steppes, the wheat is separated from the chaff. Conventional systems fail under the UV load, the constant pressure changes, and the aggressive soil chemistry. K-Aqua was developed exactly for these extremes.
landwirtschaft.section2Lead: Every millimetre of our piping systems is the result of decades of German research and development in polymer technology.
landwirtschaft.scroll1Desc: In the modern agricultural industry, piping systems are often exposed to direct sunlight and extreme temperature fluctuations for years on end. Our proprietary polymer matrix absorbs UV radiation without molecular degradation. The result: No embrittlement, no microcracks, 100% structural integrity even after decades of desert use.
landwirtschaft.scroll2Desc: Large-scale pivot irrigation systems and drip hoses require constant, enormous water pressure over huge distances. K-Aqua systems are designed to kinetically absorb pressure peaks and water hammer. The seamless welding technique guarantees absolute tightness at every joint – zero leakage tolerance for maximum resource efficiency.
landwirtschaft.scroll3Desc: Modern fertigation (the application of liquid fertilisers and pesticides through the irrigation system) requires pipes that are highly resistant to aggressive chemicals, acids, and alkalis. Our K-Aqua PPR system does not react with agrochemicals, prevents deposits thanks to its mirror-smooth inner wall, and protects soil health.
landwirtschaft.scroll4Desc: Microbiological growth inside the pipes can destroy entire harvests. K-Aqua relies on an anti-adhesive inner surface that makes the formation of biofilms and algae growth almost impossible. Clean water at the source remains clean water at the plant. German engineering for global food security.
landwirtschaft.section3Lead: Choosing K-Aqua is a mathematical certainty. Lower Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) coupled with absolute operational safety.
landwirtschaft.bento1Desc: Forget O-rings, glue, or mechanical fittings. K-Aqua pipes and fittings fuse at the molecular level into a single, inseparable unit. The risk of leaks drops to a mathematically exact 0 %.
landwirtschaft.bento2Desc: Compared to metallic systems, K-Aqua pipes weigh only a fraction. This revolutionises construction site logistics, significantly reduces transport costs, and enables rapid installation even in inaccessible terrain.
landwirtschaft.bento3Desc: The material possesses intrinsic flexibility. In the event of earth movements, settlement, or extreme temperature fluctuations, the pipe system adapts without breaking. Steel tears, K-Aqua flexes.
landwirtschaft.bento4Desc: A friction coefficient close to zero. This means less pressure loss over long distances, which means pump systems can be dimensioned significantly smaller. This not only saves initial capital but also massively reduces energy costs over decades.
landwirtschaft.section4P1: When a failure of the irrigation systems means the total loss of thousands of hectares of harvest, conventional metrics are no longer sufficient. We measure reliability in generations.
landwirtschaft.section4P2: K-Aqua certifies its industrial agricultural pipes for operating scenarios that far exceed reality. We simulate extreme water hammers, corrosive chemical cocktails, and constant seismic micro-vibrations before a single pipe leaves our plant in Germany.
landwirtschaft.timelineDesc: From the initial hydrodynamic analysis to the final fusion on site. A fully orchestrated process for maximum scalability.
landwirtschaft.timeline1Text: Our engineers analyse the topological and climatic conditions of the agricultural project using satellite databases and create a hydrodynamic profile.
landwirtschaft.timeline2Text: Individual extrusion of the K-Aqua piping systems at our German headquarters. Every batch undergoes high-resolution ultrasonic testing.
landwirtschaft.timeline3Text: Complete containerization and global transport. Our systems are lightweight and optimized for transport to the most remote growing areas on earth.
landwirtschaft.timeline4Text: Homogeneous welding connections directly on site. Our thermoplastic fusion technology creates a monolithic piping system without weak points or seals.
landwirtschaft.timeline5Text: After the system is commissioned, the infrastructure disappears from consciousness. It simply works. For the next 50+ years. Without a maintenance cycle.
landwirtschaft.section5Desc: K-Aqua agricultural systems are tested by the most renowned international testing institutes. We don't just meet the standards – we often redefine them.

landwirtschaft.ctaDesc: Let's discuss the hydraulic infrastructure of your next major project. Our engineers will create a detailed technical analysis for your specific requirements.

klimaanlagen.metaDesc: K-Aqua HVAC & Cooling – Uncompromising safety through German Engineering. Polypropylene piping systems for chilled water, air conditioning and industrial cooling.
klimaanlagen.heroDesc: Uncompromising safety for chilled water networks and HVAC systems. When global megaprojects tolerate zero downtime, K-Aqua is the only option. Engineered for generations.
klimaanlagen.section1Title: The Achilles heel of modern HVAC systems.
klimaanlagen.section1Lead: Conventional cooling systems utilising steel threads and copper press fittings inevitably fail against the laws of thermodynamics and chemistry. K-Aqua offers the way out of the cycle of corrosion and leakage.
klimaanlagen.section1P1: In industrial cooling and building HVAC, condensation, permanent temperature fluctuations, and aggressive cooling media place extreme demands on the piping system. Metallic pipes respond with condensate corrosion, insulation damage, and creeping pressure loss.
klimaanlagen.section1P2: K-Aqua Polypropylene Systems (PP-R & PP-RCT) break this paradigm. Our piping networks are completely inert to corrosion, offer outstanding flow characteristics without incrustation, and feature intrinsic thermal insulation capabilities that drastically reduce the need for external insulation. This is not a pipe, it is an infrastructural insurance policy.
klimaanlagen.scroll1Desc: Our PP-R and PP-RCT systems inherently possess extremely low thermal conductivity. This largely eliminates the risk of condensation forming on the outside of the pipe – a critical factor in modern air conditioning technology. Unlike metallic systems, expensive and time-consuming secondary insulation is often unnecessary.
klimaanlagen.scroll2Desc: Chilled water systems made of steel inevitably suffer from corrosion, leading to pitting, leaks, and the gradual destruction of the system. K-Aqua systems are 100% corrosion-resistant. No incrustation, no rusting, no narrowing of the pipe cross-section over its entire lifespan of more than 50 years.
klimaanlagen.scroll3Desc: The core of our safety technology. Through polyfusion, the pipe and fitting fuse at the molecular level into an inseparable, homogeneous unit. No O-rings, no mechanical connecting elements that fatigue over time. The result is absolute tightness, even under the strongest pressure fluctuations and mechanical stresses.
klimaanlagen.scroll4Desc: Modern HVAC systems require whisper-quiet operation. K-Aqua plastic piping systems absorb flow noise and pump vibrations much more effectively than metallic alternatives. This enables use in noise-sensitive zones such as operating theatres, luxury hotels, and concert halls without complex secondary sound insulation.
klimaanlagen.section2Lead: Discover the design principles that make K-Aqua the first choice for international MEP planners and general contractors.
klimaanlagen.bentoSubheader: Measurable superiority in every dimension of industrial refrigeration and air conditioning technology.
klimaanlagen.bento1Desc: Safe operation even at extremely low flow temperatures with appropriate heat transfer media (e.g., glycol mixtures).
klimaanlagen.bento2Desc: Complete dimension spectrum for any scale – from individual room cooling to central chillers.
klimaanlagen.bento3Desc: Compared to steel pipes. This enables fast overhead installations, reduces structural loads, and significantly lowers transport costs.
klimaanlagen.bento4Desc: Materially bonded welded joints completely eliminate the failure risks of conventional flange and thread connections.
klimaanlagen.timelineLead: From the initial thermal calculation to maintenance-free operation over decades. K-Aqua accompanies every step of the process with uncompromising precision.
klimaanlagen.timeline1Desc: Calculation of pressure drops, thermal linear expansion, and hydraulic balancing. Our engineers provide sizing support up to DN 400.
klimaanlagen.timeline2Desc: Extrusion and injection molding under cleanroom conditions at our German headquarters. Seamless quality control of every single batch.
klimaanlagen.timeline3Desc: Just-in-time delivery to the construction site. The light weight of PP-R (approx. 75% lighter than steel) massively simplifies transport and handling logistics.
klimaanlagen.timeline4Desc: Up to 50% faster installation via thermal socket welding. No open flames, no flying sparks, maximum occupational safety.
klimaanlagen.timeline5Desc: Successful pressure test and system handover. From this moment on, the decades-long, completely maintenance-free operating phase of the K-Aqua system begins.
klimaanlagen.section3P1: K-Aqua HVAC systems are tested and tested according to the strictest international standards. The material properties of PP-RCT allow for higher pressure loads with reduced wall thickness.
klimaanlagen.section3P2: This means: A larger inner diameter for the same outer diameter, which maximizes hydraulic flow and drastically reduces the pump energy required for the cooling network.
klimaanlagen.card1Desc: Conformity according to DIN EN ISO 15874 and SKZ guidelines.
klimaanlagen.card2Desc: No maintenance of the pipe network required. 100% maintenance-free.
klimaanlagen.card3Desc: Worldwide network of tested K-Aqua installers.

industrie.bento1Desc: Our PP-R and PP-RCT high-performance polymers permanently withstand extreme temperature fluctuations and highly corrosive media without molecular degradation.
industrie.bento2Desc: Homogeneously welded connections eliminate seals as a weak point. An indivisible, pressure-stable network for maximum operational reliability.
industrie.bento3Desc: Resistant to hundreds of aggressive acids, alkalis, and solvents. Ideal for chemical process engineering and semiconductor production.
industrie.bento4Desc: Significant reduction of flow noises and water hammer through material-inherent sound insulation and high wall thicknesses.
industrie.section2Lead: A look beneath the surface reveals why K-Aqua is specified in the world's most critical infrastructures.
industrie.scroll1Desc: Our production facilities in Germany work with laser measuring systems that monitor wall thicknesses and diameters in real time. industrie.scroll2Desc: Unlike mechanical connections or adhesive systems, our pipes and fittings fuse at the molecular level. The transition area becomes de facto stronger than the pipe itself. trinkwasser.metaDesc: K-Aqua Drinking Water – Uncompromising safety through German Engineering for global megaprojects.
trinkwasser.heroDesc: Uncompromising hygiene, unsurpassed longevity, and absolute corrosion resistance. K-Aqua PP-R piping systems set the ultimate global standard for transporting our most important foodstuff.
trinkwasser.section1Lead: When it comes to supplying megacities, hospitals, and large-scale industrial projects with drinking water, 'sufficient' is never enough. We build infrastructures for eternity.
trinkwasser.section1P1: Water is not just a resource; it is the foundation of civilisation. The piping systems that transport it are the invisible nervous system of our cities. A failure of this system means more than just a financial loss - it is a critical infrastructure failure.
trinkwasser.section1P2: That is why at K-Aqua we pursue an engineering approach based on the premise of zero-defect tolerance. While conventional metal or composite systems have a calculated decay time (corrosion, incrustation, seal fatigue), our PP-R and PP-RCT systems eliminate these vectors through their fundamental physical and chemical properties.
trinkwasser.section1P3: A homogeneous polyfusion weld means that the network does not consist of thousands of individual parts, but of a single, continuous macromolecule. This is the essence of German Engineering: Designing a system that not only works today, but will have exactly the same hydraulic and hygienic properties in 50 years as it did on the day it was commissioned.
trinkwasser.section2Lead: The superiority of the K-Aqua system lies not in superficial features, but in its profound material-specific design.
trinkwasser.scroll1Desc: Our drinking water systems are made of high molecular weight polypropylene random copolymer. The macromolecular structure guarantees absolute inertness towards aggressive water qualities and chemical additives. The pipes do not interact with the flow medium at the microscopic level, physically excluding any migration of particles or contamination of the drinking water at the molecular level.
trinkwasser.scroll2Desc: Forget O-rings, seals or mechanical press connections. Our system is based on homogeneous material fusion (polyfusion). Pipe and fitting fuse at 260°C into a single, inseparable physical unit. The result is a perfectly homogeneous piping system with no potential weak points at the joints. Where there is no seal, no seal can fail.
trinkwasser.scroll3Desc: The mirror-smooth inner surfaces of our pipe systems (roughness value k = 0.007 mm) offer microorganisms and biofilms no surface to attack. This eliminates the risk of legionella formation and bacteriological growth. In combination with absolute opacity, the risk of microbiological contamination is reduced to an absolute minimum, making the system the first choice for hospitals and highly sensitive infrastructures.
trinkwasser.scroll4Desc: Over the decades, metal pipes undergo a progressive corrosion and incrustation process that narrows the cross-section and drastically increases pressure loss. K-Aqua systems retain their initial hydraulic cross-section over their entire service life of more than 50 years. Pump performance remains constant, cavitation is avoided, and the operating costs of the infrastructure (OPEX) remain exactly at the calculated level.
trinkwasser.section3Lead: tested according to the strictest global standards (DIN, EN, ISO, DVGW, SKZ), K-Aqua delivers measurably superior performance across all critical KPIs.
trinkwasser.bento1Desc: While metals inevitably react with water and oxygen, PP-R remains completely inert. No pitting corrosion, no rust formation, no contamination of the medium.
trinkwasser.bento2Desc: Under standardised operating conditions (20°C / 10 bar), the system is tested for a lifespan of more than 50 years. This corresponds to the calculated useful life of modern real estate.
trinkwasser.bento3Desc: The high density and elasticity of polypropylene highly effectively absorb flow noises and pressure surges (water hammer). The result is whisper-quiet operation, ideal for premium hotels.
trinkwasser.bento4Desc: With a thermal conductivity of only 0.24 W/mK, the system drastically minimises condensation and heat loss. It requires significantly less external insulation than copper or steel pipes.
trinkwasser.bento5Desc: Our high-performance pipes (SDR 6 / PN 25) withstand massive operating pressures and temperature peaks. Designed for risers in skyscrapers and high-pressure systems.
trinkwasser.bento6Desc: Free from heavy metals, plasticisers or toxic additives. PP-R meets the highest international drinking water standards and does not affect the taste or smell of the water.
trinkwasser.bento7Desc: K-Aqua is continuously monitored by independent testing institutes. SKZ, WRAS, and many others confirm the constant, uncompromising premium quality of our production.
trinkwasser.timelineLead: From raw material to decades of use: Every step in the life cycle of a K-Aqua pipe system is subject to strict quality protocols.
trinkwasser.timeline1Desc: Selection of granules of the highest purity (Borealis / Sabic). tested control of every single batch in the K-Aqua testing laboratory for molecular weight distribution and melt flow index (MFI).
trinkwasser.timeline2Desc: Processing on state-of-the-art, computer-controlled KraussMaffei extruders. Ultrasonic wall thickness measurement during the ongoing process ensures dimensional tolerance in the micrometre range.
trinkwasser.timeline3Desc: Fully automated production of system components under cleanroom conditions. Metal thread inserts made of dezincification-resistant brass (DZR) are overmoulded in a form-fitting and torsion-proof manner.
trinkwasser.timeline4Desc: Every production batch goes through destructive burst pressure tests and creep internal pressure tests over 1000 hours at 95°C. Only 100% flawless batches are released for global export.
trinkwasser.timeline5Desc: On-site installation by tested welding technicians. Homogeneous polyfusion creates an endless system without mechanical weak points. A final pressure test verifies the integral safety of the entire network.
trinkwasser.section4Title: The sum of the technical details.
trinkwasser.section4P1: True engineering is revealed in the sum of perfect details. Our dimensional range extends from 20 mm for the last mile to 160 mm for gigantic main supply lines. Every element is precisely tailored to the system architecture.
trinkwasser.section4P2: Whether risers in an 80-storey skyscraper, complex distribution networks in industrial cooling circuits, or highly sensitive drinking water supply in clinics - the K-Aqua system world offers the exact, tested solution for every hydraulic challenge.
trinkwasser.ctaDesc: Talk to our engineering team about your next megaproject. We don't just deliver pipes, we deliver system safety.

items.title: PP-RCT matrix architecture
items.desc: The structural integrity of our polypropylene random copolymers with modified crystallinity (PP-RCT) redefines the limits of thermal resilience. A paradigm shift in fluid mechanics.

items.title: Thermodynamic insulation
items.desc: Our co-extruded insulation layers are based on closed-cell polyurethane technology. The heat transfer coefficient (U-value) is reduced to a theoretical minimum. Energy loss is no longer a variable in the calculation of your systems - it is nipped in the bud by our system architecture. Absolute thermal control.

items.title: tested sterility
items.desc: There is no compromise in drinking water infrastructure. items.title: Non-destructive testing (NDT)
items.desc: Every pipeline system goes through our automated ultrasound and X-ray diagnostics. We analyse weld seams at the submillimetre level. items.title: Molecular synthesis
items.text: The process begins at the atomic level. Catalytic polymerisation under extreme pressure conditions forms the basic PP-RCT granules. Specific nucleating agents induce the formation of the resistant beta crystal structure.

items.title: Precision co-extrusion
items.text: The granules are melted at 240°C and pressed through calibrated tools. The simultaneous extrusion of several functional layers (glass fiber compound, top layer) is carried out with micrometer-precise laser control.

items.title: Thermal stabilization
items.text: A complex cooling protocol fixes the macromolecular orientation. The controlled temperature gradient prevents internal stresses and guarantees absolute dimensional stability of the pipe geometry.

transitionFittings.seoText: Transition fittings serve as the crucial bridge between advanced K Aqua PP-R/PPRCT pipes and existing steel, copper, or brass components. These fittings require an extraordinary level of engineering.
transitionFittings.guideText:
When connecting modern polymer systems to traditional metallic infrastructure, secure and homogeneous connections are absolutely paramount. Transition fittings serve as the crucial bridge between advanced K Aqua PP-R/PPRCT pipes and existing steel, copper, or brass components such as boilers, chillers, and sanitary fixtures. These fittings require an extraordinary level of engineering to ensure that the metal-to-plastic joint remains absolutely leak-tight, even under extreme thermal cycling and mechanical stress.

K Aqua transition fittings feature deeply embedded, anti-rotation DZR (Dezincification Resistant) brass inserts. During the injection molding process, the hot PP-R is formed directly around the complex geometric profile of the brass insert. As the plastic cools and shrinks, it grips the brass with immense force, forming an inseparable mechanical bond. This design prevents the brass insert from twisting or pulling out, even when subjected to the high torque of a plumber's wrench during installation.

Furthermore, the high-quality DZR brass ensures that the metallic part of the fitting is highly resistant to aggressive water conditions, preventing the premature corrosion that often plagues standard brass fittings. This is especially critical in hot water systems where reaction rates are significantly accelerated.

  • DZR brass inserts offer superior resistance to dezincification and corrosion.
  • Anti-rotation design easily withstands high torques during threaded installations.
  • Inseparable bond between plastic and metal ensures lifelong leak-free performance.
  • Available in a wide range of male and female threaded configurations.
  • Perfect for connecting PP-R networks to metallic pumps, valves, and boilers.

Whether you need to adapt a massive 125 mm industrial cooling line to a steel flange or simply connect a 20 mm residential water line to a chrome angle valve, K Aqua provides the exact transition piece required. Our extensive catalog includes straight adapters, threaded elbows, wall plate brackets, and robust metal unions, ensuring total versatility on the job site.

Trusting K Aqua transition fittings eliminates the weakest link in hybrid plumbing systems. Our uncompromising approach to manufacturing guarantees that the transition between metal and polymer is as strong and reliable as the pipe itself, providing peace of mind to both the installer and the end-user.

pipes.guideTitle: Comprehensive Guide: Planning and Installation of K Aqua PP-R & PPRCT Pipe Systems
pipes.guideText:
Comprehensive Guide: Planning, Materials Science and Installation of K Aqua PP-R & PPRCT Pipe Systems

Choosing the right pipe material is the crucial foundation for the longevity, operational reliability and energy efficiency of modern building and industrial infrastructures. Our PP-R and PPRCT pipe systems, manufactured in Germany (Waldsolms), offer the future-proof alternative to conventional metal pipes made of copper, steel or brass thanks to their excellent thermal, chemical and mechanical properties.

Whether in building services for drinking water and heating networks, in industrial plant construction, in cooling systems or in shipbuilding – K Aqua pipes stand for uncompromising German engineering and ensure absolutely leak-free and maintenance-free operation for decades.

Material Innovation: PP-R and PPRCT in Direct Comparison

While standard Polypropylene Random Copolymer (PP-R) already has excellent properties in terms of corrosion resistance and hygiene, the advanced PPRCT (Polypropylene Random Copolymer with Modified Crystallinity Temperature resistance) sets new standards in piping technology. Through a targeted modification of the crystal structure in the polymerization process, PPRCT offers significantly higher pressure resistance at elevated operating temperatures up to 95°C.

This material advantage makes it possible to produce pipes with significantly lower wall thicknesses (higher SDR classes) at the same nominal pressure. The results for the user are outstanding:

  • Increased hydraulic flow: A larger internal diameter increases the flow volume by up to 17% compared to standard PP-R pipes.
  • Reduced pipe weight: The saving of material considerably simplifies transport and handling on the construction site.
  • Higher pressure reserves: Maximum safety reserves even at peak loads in continuous hot water use.

Fiber Composite Technology (K-Fiber) for Minimal Linear Expansion

A central aspect in the planning of hot water and heating pipes is the thermal linear expansion of plastic pipes. K Aqua meets this challenge with the innovative K-Fiber composite technology. The three-layer K-Fiber pipes have a middle polypropylene layer reinforced with high-strength glass fibers.

This mechanical stabilization reduces the linear thermal expansion coefficient to exactly 0.035 mm/(m·K) – which corresponds to a reduction in thermal linear expansion of around 75% compared to non-reinforced solid plastic pipes. For specialist planners and installers, this means:

  • Fewer expansion compensators: Significant saving of bending legs and expansion loops in the pipeline routing.
  • Larger fastening distances: Saving of pipe clamps and fixed points during route planning.
  • Dimensionally stable installation: No sagging of the pipes in open routes or risers.

Homogeneous Polyfusion Welding: Leak Safety for 50+ Years

The heart of the K Aqua pipe system is the permanent, material-bonding connection technology through thermal polyfusion. During the welding process, the pipe end and the socket of the fitting are heated to exactly 260°C using an electronically controlled welding device. The polymer chains of both components melt at the joining surfaces.

When joined together, the melted macromolecules interlock completely at the molecular level. After cooling, a homogeneous, monolithic material structure is created without seams, adhesives or elastic seals. Since no rubber O-rings or mechanical press connections are used, aging damage, resinification or brittleness of seals are a thing of the past. The welded connection withstands the same pressures as the pipe itself.

Hydraulics, Hygiene and Environmental Compatibility

Drinking water safety and energy efficiency are top priorities at K Aqua. The mirror-smooth inner surface of our PP-R and PPRCT pipes has an extremely low roughness of only k = 0.007 mm. This effectively prevents the adhesion of limescale deposits (incrustation) and stops the formation of breeding grounds for biofilms and legionella.

In addition, the material polypropylene is physiologically completely harmless, tasteless and odorless, and free of heavy metals and plasticizers. K Aqua pipe systems are certified worldwide according to the strictest test standards (e.g. DVGW, KIWA, WRAS). The system is also ecologically convincing: The polymer is 100% recyclable and has an excellent ecological balance in the manufacturing process compared to metal pipes.

Important Installation and Planning Notes

To ensure flawless function over the guaranteed lifespan of 50 years, the following points must be observed during installation:

  • Pressure test: After completion of the assembly, the pipe network must be subjected to a pressure test in accordance with DIN 1988 / DIN EN 806.
  • Thermal insulation: Pipes for hot water and heating must be professionally insulated in accordance with the applicable energy saving regulations (e.g. GEG) in order to minimize heat losses.
  • UV protection: When installed outdoors, UV-protected pipes must be used or suitable covers provided.
pipes.areas: Drinking water installation, heating systems, HVAC, industrial plants, shipbuilding

faq.q: What distinguishes PPRCT from conventional PP-R in piping systems?
faq.a: PPRCT (Polypropylene Random Copolymer with Modified Crystallinity Temperature resistance) has a specially modified crystal structure that enables higher pressure resistance at elevated operating temperatures. This allows thinner-walled pipes to be used at the same nominal pressure, increasing the inner diameter and hydraulic flow capacity by up to 17%.

faq.q: How does K-Fiber composite technology reduce thermal linear expansion?
faq.a: Our K-Fiber pipes have an integrated middle layer of glass-fiber-reinforced polypropylene. This layer mechanically stabilizes the pipe and lowers the expansion coefficient to approx. 0.035 mm/(m·K). This corresponds to a 75% reduction in thermal linear expansion compared to standard plastic pipes.

faq.q: Are K Aqua PP-R pipe systems certified for drinking water?
faq.a: Yes, K Aqua pipe systems meet the strictest testing and hygiene requirements of international certification bodies such as DVGW, KIWA and WRAS. The material is completely harmless, tasteless and odorless, and effectively prevents limescale and biofilm formation.

faq.q: How is an absolutely leak-free welded connection made?
faq.a: The connection is made by thermal polyfusion at 260°C. Pipe and fitting fuse at the molecular level into a homogeneous, inseparable unit. Because no error-prone rubber seals or press fittings are used, the weld remains completely tight for over 50 years.

faq.q: What pressure classes and dimensions are available for K Aqua pipes?
faq.a: K Aqua offers pipe systems in the pressure classes SDR 6, SDR 7.4, SDR 9 and SDR 11 (PN10 to PN25) as well as in outer diameters from 20 mm to 250 mm. This makes it possible to realize fine-grained floor distributions as well as massive main and riser pipes.

fittings.guideTitle: Technical Guide: Secure Connections with K Aqua Fittings
fittings.guideText:
Fittings are the heart of every complex pipe network. With high-quality K Aqua PP-R fittings, you can realize installations that withstand the highest pressures and temperatures.

The advantages of homogeneous welding are undisputed:

  • Material-bonding connection: When heated, the fitting and pipe fuse into a single workpiece. This consistently eliminates weak points such as aging O-rings or mechanical compressions.
  • Flow optimization: Our fittings are designed so that the cross-section is maintained at the connection points. This minimizes turbulence and reduces the energy consumption of circulation pumps.
  • Highest material quality: The use of premium Polypropylene Random Copolymer achieves outstanding chemical and thermal resistance that far exceeds normative requirements.

During processing, attention must be paid to clean, burr-free cuts and strict adherence to heating and cooling times. This guarantees the maintenance-free operating time of over 50 years assured by the manufacturer in all installation areas.

valves.guideTitle: Expert Guide: System Control with K Aqua Valves and Fittings
valves.guideText:
Precise control and isolation of material flows is essential in modern water and heating networks. K Aqua shut-off valves and fittings combine the durability of polypropylene with the precision of metallic sealing and adjustment mechanisms.

What you need to know when integrating PP-R valves:

  • Dead-space-free design: To prevent stagnation water and germ formation (e.g. legionella), our valves have a flow-optimized and hygienic design, making them ideal for sensitive drinking water installations.
  • Pressure and temperature stability: The solid valve bodies and high-quality brass or PP balls ensure 100% sealing, even under extreme pressure shocks and high flow temperatures.
  • Ease of maintenance: Even after many years of continuous use, K Aqua ball valves and inclined seat valves can be operated smoothly and precisely thanks to Teflon-coated sealing elements.

For maximum system availability, we recommend positioning the valves strategically during the planning phase so that maintenance work and flushing processes can be carried out without extensive network interruptions.
