weldInSaddles.guideTitle: Installation Guide: Flexibility through Weld-in Saddles
weldInSaddles.guideText:
Modifying or expanding existing industrial and commercial pipe networks often involves a great deal of effort. Here, K Aqua weld-in saddles offer an efficient and extremely secure solution for creating subsequent branches without line interruption.

The main technical advantages at a glance:

  • Minimal installation time: Instead of cutting the main pipe and installing conventional T-pieces, the pipe is simply drilled to fit exactly and the saddle is welded on. This drastically reduces installation costs.
  • Preservation of system integrity: Through polyfusion, the weld-in saddle bonds inseparably to the pipe wall, maintaining the system's original pressure and temperature resistance (up to PN 25).
  • Flexible connection options: Available as a pure plastic branch or with an integrated metal thread (female/male thread), saddles enable the direct connection of sensors, pressure gauges or branch lines in tight spaces.

To ensure a flawless weld, the use of special K Aqua drilling and welding tools is strictly necessary, as they guarantee the exact milling depth and heating surface for a perfect connection.

tools.guideTitle: Practical Guide: Professional Tools for K Aqua Pipe Assembly
tools.guideText:
The quality of a plastic pipe installation stands or falls with the precision of the tools used. K Aqua welding and cutting tools are specifically tailored to the thermoplastic properties of PP-R and PPRCT to achieve flawless results.

Why professional equipment is indispensable:

  • Flawless preparation: An absolutely rectangular and burr-free cut is the basic prerequisite for a tight weld. Our pipe cutters and cold circular saws prevent material compression and micro-cracks.
  • Thermodynamic precision: The microprocessor-controlled socket welding devices maintain the ideal joining temperature of 260°C constant even under adverse weather conditions, reliably preventing polymer degradation.
  • Automated safety: For large nominal diameters, our computer-controlled butt welding and electrofusion welding machines eliminate human error by fully automatically regulating pressure, time and temperature and documenting them digitally for site acceptance.

Regular maintenance and cleaning of the Teflon-coated heating mandrels is essential to ensure a homogeneous melt and permanently resilient, leak-free pipe networks.

accessories.guideTitle: Expert Guide: K Aqua Accessories for Standard-Compliant Installations
accessories.guideText:
A high-quality pipe system requires equally high-quality accessories. The K Aqua range includes all essential components to ensure longevity, safety and compliance with all building physics standards.

The most important aspects of using our accessories correctly:

  • Compensation for linear expansion: Plastic pipes expand when temperatures change. The targeted use of our thermodynamic pipe clamps as fixed and sliding points safely absorbs these movements and protects the system from harmful internal stresses. This is particularly crucial in industrial plants and risers, where uncontrolled expansion could lead to structural damage.
  • Tight flange connections: For transitions to large valves, pumps or tanks, our loose flanges and precisely matched EPDM flat gaskets offer absolute safety at high contact pressures and continuous vibrations. They guarantee a seamless, liquid-tight connection, preventing potentially disastrous leaks in critical infrastructures.
  • Repair solutions: With our innovative repair plug, accidentally drilled pipes (e.g. on construction sites) can be homogeneously welded in minutes, restoring the pipe's full mechanical load capacity. A complete replacement of the pipe section is therefore unnecessary.

In addition to compensation and tightness, insulation and fire protection play a central role in professional installation. The K Aqua accessories range is designed to minimize thermal losses and meet the highest safety standards. Our special seals and fasteners are designed to effectively dampen sound transmission and prevent structure-borne noise propagation in the masonry.

By exclusively using original K Aqua accessories, you secure the full system warranty and avoid costly defects caused by incompatible third-party products. Invest in uncompromising quality to guarantee the trouble-free operation of your piping system for decades.

faq.q: Are the accessories suitable for cold and hot water?
faq.a: Yes, our accessories such as pipe clamps and flat gaskets are designed for use in cold water, hot water and heating systems and exhibit excellent thermal stability.

faq.q: Can I use third-party accessories?
faq.a: To claim the full K Aqua system warranty, it is mandatory to use original accessories. Third-party components can lead to sealing problems or mechanical failures.

faq.q: Are there special accessories for industrial use?
faq.a: Yes, our range includes heavy-duty loose flanges with steel cores, special EPDM seals and reinforced pipe clamps that can easily withstand extreme industrial loads.

hero.lead: From Waldsolms to the world: K-Aqua PP-R and PP-RCT systems have been running for decades in high-rises, hospitals, industrial plants, and ships — under conditions that allow no second attempt.

manifesto.title: The Doctrine of Precision
manifesto.p1: In an industry where material fatigue and corrosion are treated as inevitable, our manufacturing sets a different standard. We regard every pipe not as a component, but as the outcome of applied materials science. Every batch of PP-R copolymer, every weld, and every wall thickness passes through a testing process that would rather accept scrap than a tolerance breach. This is the fundamental law of the K-Aqua Reference Class.
manifesto.p2: Our systems operate in environments where a single point of leakage can jeopardize the operation of an entire hospital or high-rise. We apply long-term internal pressure testing to ISO 9080 not as a laboratory formality, but as a hard requirement for every approved dimension: extrapolated to a 50-year service life at specified temperature and pressure rating — documented, traceable, and batch-pure.
manifesto.p3: We deliberately avoid opaque material blends. Our formulation is documented across the entire manufacturing chain — from polymer batch to finished pipe length. We calibrate extrusion temperatures to the degree, optimize the fiber-composite middle layer against longitudinal expansion, and log every electrofusion weld with exact process parameters. The result: systems that stay comfortably within spec under continuous operation at 70°C and PN20.
manifesto.p4: For us, quality assurance is not a downstream inspection step — it is built into every stage of production. By consistently applying DVGW, SKZ, and KIWA certification across all relevant dimensions, we proactively close off every avenue of failure risk. A system manufactured to DIN 8077/8078 and triple-certified can never become the weak link.

metrics.lead: Our systems aren't advertised — they're tested. These are the core metrics behind our engineering doctrine.

pressure.title: Long-Term Pressure Testing to ISO 9080
pressure.desc: Every approved dimension undergoes internal pressure testing at multiple temperature levels over thousands of operating hours — extrapolated along a regression line to a 50-year service life.
pressure.placeholder: Long-term internal pressure test regression curve

isolation.title: Seamless Batch Traceability
isolation.desc: Every pipe length carries a batch number traceable all the way back to the polymer delivery — ensuring complete documentation for project acceptance and warranty claims.

tolerance.title: Wall-Thickness Tolerance in the Micrometer Range
tolerance.desc: Continuous ultrasonic wall-thickness measurement during extrusion keeps every dimension precisely within DIN 8077/8078 tolerance fields.

network.title: Global Distribution and Service Network
network.desc: From Waldsolms, we supply projects in more than 35 countries, providing technical consultation, training, and spare-parts supply — well beyond project handover.

welding.title: Uncompromising Weld Integrity
welding.desc: Every heating-element socket weld follows a documented time-temperature-pressure profile. Random-sample tensile tests and microsection images confirm the molecular fusion of pipe and fitting — no seals, no weak points.
